content.json:
🎯 AI红队测试与对抗验证

集成garak、PromptInject和OWASP LLM Top 10攻击基线，评估模型暴露面并结合实时告警。

content.query:
let attackIndicators = dynamic(['prompt injection','jailbreak','dan','gcg','encoding','glitch','adversarial','poison','backdoor','exfiltration','model steal','extraction','inversion','membership','hallucination','xss','ssrf','data leak','token reuse','api abuse']);
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where tostring(AlertName) has_any (attackIndicators) or tostring(Description) has_any (attackIndicators)
| extend AttackVector = case(
    AlertName has 'prompt' or AlertName has 'injection', ' 提示词注入',
    AlertName has 'jailbreak' or Description has 'jailbreak', ' 越狱',
    AlertName has 'poison' or Description has 'poison', ' 模型投毒',
    AlertName has 'backdoor', ' 后门',
    AlertName has 'exfiltration' or Description has 'exfiltration', ' 数据外泄',
    AlertName has 'steal' or Description has 'model steal' or Description has 'extraction', ' 模型提取',
    AlertName has 'inversion' or Description has 'inversion', ' 模型反演',
    AlertName has 'membership' or Description has 'membership', ' 成员推理攻击',
    AlertName has 'adversarial' or Description has 'evasion', ' 对抗逃逸',
    AlertName has 'hallucination', ' 幻觉',
    AlertName has 'api' and AlertName has 'abuse', ' API滥用',
    ' 其他'
)
| summarize Alerts=count(), High=countif(AlertSeverity=='高'), Medium=countif(AlertSeverity=='中'), Low=countif(AlertSeverity=='低'), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by AttackVector
| extend RiskScore = High*5 + Medium*2 + Low
| project ['攻击向量']=AttackVector,['告警数量']=Alerts,['高严重度']=High,['中严重度']=Medium,['低严重度']=Low,['风险评分']=RiskScore,['最后已观察']=format_datetime(LastSeen,'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['风险评分'] desc
content.title: 🎯 AI 攻击向量分析

content.query:
// Multi-Stage Attack Chain Detection
let window=24h;
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| extend AlertNameLower = tolower(AlertName), DescriptionLower = tolower(Description)
| where AlertNameLower has_any ('prompt','inject','jailbreak','steal','extract','poison','exfiltration','ai','model','copilot') or
        DescriptionLower has_any ('prompt','inject','jailbreak','steal','extract','poison','exfiltration','ai','model')
| extend BaseEntity = coalesce(
    CompromisedEntity, 
    tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0].Name),
    tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0].HostName),
    '未知'
)
| where BaseEntity != '未知'
| summarize 
    Stages = make_set(AlertName), 
    FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), 
    LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated), 
    AlertCount=count(),
    SeverityList = make_set(AlertSeverity),
    HighSeverityCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "高")
  by BaseEntity
| extend StageCount=array_length(Stages)
| extend DurationHours = datetime_diff('hour', LastSeen, FirstSeen)
| where StageCount >= 2 or AlertCount >= 3
| extend AttackComplexity = case(
    StageCount >= 4, "🔥 复杂多阶段攻击",
    StageCount >= 3, "🔴 高级攻击链路",
    StageCount >= 2, "🟠 两阶段攻击",
    "🟡 单阶段"
)
| project 
    ['目标实体']=BaseEntity,
    ['攻击复杂度']=AttackComplexity,
    ['攻击阶段']=StageCount,
    ['总计告警']=AlertCount,
    ['高严重度告警']=HighSeverityCount,
    ['持续时间(小时)']=DurationHours,
    ['阶段集合']=tostring(Stages),
    ['首次已观察']=format_datetime(FirstSeen,'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后已观察']=format_datetime(LastSeen,'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['攻击阶段'] desc, ['总计告警'] desc
| take 50
content.title: 🎯 多阶段攻击链路检测

content.query:
//  AI Security Testing & Vulnerability Assessment
// Tracks AI-related security alerts that indicate testing and vulnerability findings
// Uses SecurityAlert table for actual security test results and findings
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where AlertName has_any ("Test", "漏洞", "Jailbreak", "Prompt", "注入", "漏洞利用", "弱点", "安全")
       or Description has_any ("test", "vulnerability", "security assessment", "penetration", "red team")
| extend
    TestType = case(
        AlertName has "Jailbreak" or Description has "jailbreak", " 越狱测试",
        AlertName has "Prompt" and AlertName has "注入", " 提示词注入测试",
        AlertName has "漏洞利用" or AlertName has "漏洞", " 漏洞测试",
        AlertName has "安全", " 安全评估",
        AlertName has "Penetration" or Description has "pen test", " 渗透测试",
        " 通用安全测试"
    ),
    TestResult = case(
        Status == "Resolved", " 已缓解",
        Status == "已解除", " 已接受风险",
        Status == "InProgress", " 进行中",
        Status == "New", " 新发现",
        " 未知"
    ),
    VulnerabilityFound = Status in ("New", "InProgress"),
    Severity = AlertSeverity,
    Tester = coalesce(CompromisedEntity, "安全团队")
| extend
    TargetModel = coalesce(tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0]), "AI系统")
| summarize
    TotalTests = count(),
    MitigatedTests = countif(TestResult == " 已缓解"),
    ActiveFindings = countif(TestResult in (" 新发现", " 进行中")),
    AcceptedRisks = countif(TestResult == " 已接受风险"),
    VulnerabilitiesFound = countif(VulnerabilityFound == true),
    HighSeverityCount = countif(Severity == "高"),
    MediumSeverityCount = countif(Severity == "中"),
    LowSeverityCount = countif(Severity == "低"),
    FirstTest = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastTest = max(TimeGenerated)
  by TestType
| extend
    MitigationRate = round((todouble(MitigatedTests) / todouble(TotalTests)) * 100, 1),
    VulnerabilityRate = round((todouble(ActiveFindings) / todouble(TotalTests)) * 100, 1),
    RiskScore = (HighSeverityCount * 5) + (MediumSeverityCount * 3) + (LowSeverityCount * 1)
| extend SecurityPosture = case(
    VulnerabilityRate >= 50 or HighSeverityCount >= 5, " 严重 - 需立即处理",
    VulnerabilityRate >= 30 or HighSeverityCount >= 3, " 高风险 - 需修复",
    VulnerabilityRate >= 10 or HighSeverityCount >= 1, " 中风险 - 需审查",
    MitigationRate >= 70, " 良好 - 持续监控",
    " 基线 - 需更多测试"
)
| project
    ['测试类型'] = TestType,
    ['安全态势'] = SecurityPosture,
    ['总计测试数'] = TotalTests,
    ['缓解率 %'] = MitigationRate,
    ['活跃发现项 %'] = VulnerabilityRate,
    ['风险评分'] = RiskScore,
    ['已缓解'] = MitigatedTests,
    ['活跃问题项'] = ActiveFindings,
    ['已接受风险项'] = AcceptedRisks,
    ['漏洞'] = VulnerabilitiesFound,
    ['高严重度'] = HighSeverityCount,
    ['中严重度'] = MediumSeverityCount,
    ['低严重度'] = LowSeverityCount,
    ['首次测试'] = format_datetime(FirstTest, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后测试'] = format_datetime(LastTest, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['风险评分'] desc, ['活跃发现项 %'] desc
content.title: 🎯 AI 安全测试 & 漏洞评估

content.query:
//  AI Security Vulnerability Findings & Remediation Priority
// Detailed breakdown of AI security vulnerabilities and their remediation status
// Uses SecurityAlert table for actual vulnerability findings
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where AlertName has_any ("漏洞", "Jailbreak", "Prompt", "注入", "弱点", "漏洞利用", "风险")
| extend
    FindingType = case(
        AlertName has "Jailbreak", " 越狱漏洞",
        AlertName has "Prompt" and AlertName has "注入", " 提示词注入弱点",
        Description has "Bias" or AlertName has "Bias", " 偏差检测",
        Description has "Toxic" or AlertName has "Toxic", " 有害内容问题",
        Description has "Hallucination" or AlertName has "Hallucination", " 幻觉风险",
        Description has "泄露" or AlertName has "泄露", " 数据泄露",
        Description has "Unauthorized" or AlertName has "Unauthorized", " 未授权访问",
        " 其他漏洞"
    ),
    VulnerabilitySeverity = AlertSeverity,
    Details = substring(Description, 0, 100)
| extend
    ModelName = trim(' "', coalesce(
        tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0].Name),
        tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0].HostName),
        tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0].Address),
        tostring(CompromisedEntity),
        "AI系统"
    ))
| summarize
    FindingCount = count(),
    CriticalCount = countif(VulnerabilitySeverity == "高"),
    HighCount = countif(VulnerabilitySeverity == "中"),
    MediumCount = countif(VulnerabilitySeverity == "低"),
    ResolvedCount = countif(Status == "Resolved"),
    ActiveCount = countif(Status in ("New", "InProgress")),
    AffectedSystems = make_set(ModelName, 5),
    SampleDetails = make_set(Details, 2),
    FirstFound = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastFound = max(TimeGenerated)
  by FindingType, VulnerabilitySeverity
| extend
    UrgencyScore = (CriticalCount * 5) + (HighCount * 3) + (MediumCount * 2) + ActiveCount,
    RemediationRate = round((todouble(ResolvedCount) / todouble(FindingCount)) * 100, 1)
| extend RemediationPriority = case(
    UrgencyScore >= 20, " P0 - 立即处理",
    UrgencyScore >= 10, " P1 - 紧急",
    UrgencyScore >= 5, " P2 - 高优先级",
    " P3 - 正常"
)
| project
    ['修复优先级'] = RemediationPriority,
    ['发现项类型'] = FindingType,
    ['严重度'] = VulnerabilitySeverity,
    ['紧急度评分'] = UrgencyScore,
    ['总计发现项'] = FindingCount,
    ['严重/高'] = CriticalCount,
    ['中'] = HighCount,
    ['低'] = MediumCount,
    ['活跃问题项'] = ActiveCount,
    ['已处置'] = ResolvedCount,
    ['修复率 %'] = RemediationRate,
    ['受影响系统'] = strcat_array(AffectedSystems, ' | '),
    ['样本详情'] = tostring(SampleDetails),
    ['首次发现'] = format_datetime(FirstFound, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后发现'] = format_datetime(LastFound, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['紧急度评分'] desc, ['总计发现项'] desc
content.title: 🔍 AI 安全漏洞发现项 & 修复优先级

content.query:
//  AI Model Safety Assessment & Alert Coverage
// Evaluates AI model security posture based on security alerts
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where AlertName has_any ("AI", "模型", "Prompt", "Jailbreak", "注入", "GPT", "Copilot", "OpenAI", "Cognitive", "聊天", "LLM")
   or CompromisedEntity has_any ("AI", "模型", "GPT", "Copilot", "OpenAI", "Cognitive", "聊天")
   or Description has_any ("AI", "模型", "Prompt", "GPT", "Copilot")
| extend
    ModelName = case(
        CompromisedEntity has "gpt" or AlertName has "gpt", "GPT模型",
        CompromisedEntity has "copilot" or AlertName has "copilot", "Microsoft Copilot",
        CompromisedEntity has "openai" or AlertName has "openai", "Azure OpenAI",
        CompromisedEntity has "cognitive" or AlertName has "cognitive", "Azure Cognitive Services",
        AlertName has "聊天" or CompromisedEntity has "chat", "聊天AI服务",
        AlertName has "LLM", "LLM服务",
        "其他AI模型"
    )
| extend
    IsMitigated = Status in ("Resolved", "已解除"),
    IsActive = Status in ("New", "InProgress", "活跃")
| summarize
    TotalAlerts = count(),
    Mitigated = countif(IsMitigated),
    ActiveFindings = countif(IsActive),
    CriticalCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "严重"),
    HighCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "高"),
    MediumCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "中"),
    LastAlert = max(TimeGenerated)
  by ModelName
| extend
    MitigationRate = round((todouble(Mitigated) / todouble(TotalAlerts)) * 100, 1),
    AlertAge = datetime_diff('day', now(), LastAlert)
| extend
    SafetyScore = case(
        MitigationRate >= 95 and CriticalCount == 0, 95,
        MitigationRate >= 90 and CriticalCount == 0, 85,
        MitigationRate >= 80 and CriticalCount <= 1, 75,
        MitigationRate >= 70 and CriticalCount <= 2, 60,
        MitigationRate >= 50, 40,
        20
    ),
    SafetyGrade = case(
        MitigationRate >= 95 and CriticalCount == 0, "✅ A - 优秀",
        MitigationRate >= 90 and CriticalCount == 0, "🟢 B - 良好",
        MitigationRate >= 80 and CriticalCount <= 1, "🟡 C - 一般",
        MitigationRate >= 70 and CriticalCount <= 2, "🟠 D - 需改进",
        "🔴 F - 严重问题"
    ),
    TestingStatus = case(
        AlertAge <= 7, "✅ 近期已监控",
        AlertAge <= 30, "⚠️ 即将审查",
        AlertAge <= 90, "🟠 需关注",
        "🔴 严重 - 无近期活动"
    )
| project
    ['模型名称'] = ModelName,
    ['安全等级'] = SafetyGrade,
    ['安全评分'] = SafetyScore,
    ['测试状态'] = TestingStatus,
    ['总计告警'] = TotalAlerts,
    ['缓解率 %'] = MitigationRate,
    ['已缓解'] = Mitigated,
    ['活跃'] = ActiveFindings,
    ['严重'] = CriticalCount,
    ['高'] = HighCount,
    ['距最近告警天数'] = AlertAge,
    ['最后告警'] = format_datetime(LastAlert, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['安全评分'] asc, ['距最近告警天数'] desc
content.title: 🛡️ AI 模型安全评估 & 告警覆盖度

content.json:
📊 AI安全总览仪表板

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：该视图提供企业AI安全态势的360度全景。通过关联分析安全事件、威胁趋势与关键指标，可帮助安全团队洞察整体AI风险暴露面，定位紧急问题并优先处理响应。

🔍 实时监控

基于最近30天数据的AI安全威胁实时态势感知

📈 趋势分析

时间序列洞察，揭示威胁轨迹与异常模式

---

content.query:
// AI security KPI summary - Simplified and Enhanced
let aiKeywords = dynamic([
    "模型", "Prompt", "AI", "Copilot", "Jailbreak", "注入", "GPT", "Claude",
    "LLM", "提示词注入", "训练数据投毒", "模型拒绝服务", 
    "对抗攻击", "投毒", "后门", "防御逃逸", "模型窃取"
]);

// Core threat statistics
let threatStats = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where AlertName has_any (aiKeywords)
| summarize 
    TotalAlerts = count(),
    CriticalAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == "严重"),
    HighAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == "高"),
    MediumAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == "中"),
    UniqueThreats = dcount(AlertName),
    AffectedEntities = dcount(CompromisedEntity)
| extend 
    RiskScore = CriticalAlerts * 10 + HighAlerts * 5 + MediumAlerts * 2;

// Active incidents
let incidentStats = SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Title has_any (aiKeywords)
| summarize 
    TotalIncidents = count(),
    ActiveIncidents = countif(Status in ("New", "活跃")),
    AvgSeverity = avg(case(Severity == "高", 3, Severity == "中", 2, 1));

// AI user activity
let userStats = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName)
| where AppNameLower has_any ("chat", "copilot", "ai", "gpt", "openai")
| summarize 
    ActiveAIUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    FailedSignins = countif(ResultType != 0),
    SuccessRate = round(todouble(countif(ResultType == 0)) / todouble(count()) * 100, 1);

// Consolidated dashboard
threatStats
| extend 
    TotalIncidents = toscalar(incidentStats | project TotalIncidents),
    ActiveIncidents = toscalar(incidentStats | project ActiveIncidents),
    ActiveAIUsers = toscalar(userStats | project ActiveAIUsers),
    FailedSignins = toscalar(userStats | project FailedSignins),
    SuccessRate = toscalar(userStats | project SuccessRate)
| project 
    ['指标'] = "📊 AI安全总览(最近30天)",
    ['🚨 总计告警'] = TotalAlerts,
    ['🔥 严重'] = CriticalAlerts,
    ['🔴 高'] = HighAlerts,
    ['📋 活跃事件数'] = ActiveIncidents,
    ['🎯 唯一威胁'] = UniqueThreats,
    ['👥 活跃 AI 用户数(7d)'] = ActiveAIUsers,
    ['⚠️ 失败登录次数'] = FailedSignins,
    ['💯 成功率 %'] = SuccessRate,
    ['� 风险评分'] = RiskScore

content.json:
## 📊 AI安全趋势分析
---

content.query:
// Top AI Security Threats - Real-time Detection
let aiKeywords = dynamic(["模型", "Prompt", "AI", "Copilot", "Jailbreak", "注入", "LLM"]);

SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where AlertName has_any (aiKeywords)
| extend 
    ThreatCategory = case(
        AlertName has "Prompt" or AlertName has "注入", "🎯 提示词注入",
        AlertName has "Jailbreak" or AlertName has "绕过", "🔓 越狱攻击",
        AlertName has "模型" and AlertName has "Poison", "☠️ 模型投毒",
        AlertName has "数据外泄" or AlertName has "泄露", "📤 数据外泄",
        AlertName has "Copilot", "💼 Copilot滥用",
        AlertName has "Unauthorized", "🚫 未授权访问",
        "⚠️ 其他AI威胁"
    ),
    SeverityLevel = case(
        AlertSeverity == "严重", "🔥 严重",
        AlertSeverity == "高", "🔴 高",
        AlertSeverity == "中", "🟠 中",
        "🟡 低"
    )
| summarize 
    ['告警数量'] = count(),
    ['受影响实体'] = dcount(CompromisedEntity),
    ['严重度'] = max(SeverityLevel),
    ['最后检测到'] = max(TimeGenerated)
  by ['威胁类型'] = ThreatCategory
| project 
    ['威胁类型'],
    ['告警数量'],
    ['严重度'],
    ['受影响实体'],
    ['最后检测到'] = format_datetime(['最后检测到'], 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['告警数量'] desc
| take 10
content.title: 🎯 重点 AI 安全威胁(最后 7 天)

content.query:
// AI Application Usage by Service Type
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName)
| where AppNameLower has_any ("chat", "copilot", "ai", "gpt", "openai", "claude", "azure")
| extend 
    ServiceType = case(
        AppNameLower has "copilot", "💼 Microsoft Copilot",
        AppNameLower has "chat" or AppNameLower has "gpt", "💬 聊天服务",
        AppNameLower has "openai", "🤖 OpenAI服务",
        AppNameLower has "azure" and AppNameLower has "ai", "☁️ Azure AI",
        AppNameLower has "cognitive", "🧠 认知服务",
        "🔧 其他AI服务"
    )
| summarize 
    UserCount = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    TotalSessions = count(),
    SuccessRate = round(todouble(countif(ResultType == 0)) / todouble(count()) * 100, 1),
    FailedAttempts = countif(ResultType != 0)
  by ServiceType
| extend 
    UsageLevel = case(
        TotalSessions >= 1000, "🔥 极高",
        TotalSessions >= 500, "🔴 高",
        TotalSessions >= 100, "🟠 中",
        "🟢 低"
    )
| project 
    ['服务类型'] = ServiceType,
    ['使用级别'] = UsageLevel,
    ['用户数量'] = UserCount,
    ['总计会话数'] = TotalSessions,
    ['成功率 %'] = SuccessRate,
    ['失败尝试'] = FailedAttempts
| order by ['总计会话数'] desc
content.title: 📊 AI 应用使用分布(最后 7 天)

content.json:
🔥 AI威胁监控

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：该视图聚焦于AI安全威胁的深度检测。实时追踪AI特定告警、模型风险与攻击链路，提供可执行的威胁情报，帮助安全团队快速响应AI事件。

🔥 威胁检测

实时识别越狱攻击、提示词注入、模型投毒及新兴AI威胁

🔥 风险评估

利用MITRE ATT&CK框架分析攻击链路与高风险AI模型

---

content.query:
// Latest AI security threat events (field reference update)
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where AlertName has "模型" or AlertName has "Prompt" or AlertName has "AI" or AlertName has "Copilot" or AlertName has "Jailbreak" or AlertName has "注入"
| extend 
    SeverityIcon = case(
        AlertSeverity == "高", "🔴",
        AlertSeverity == "中", "🟠",
        AlertSeverity == "低", "🟡",
        "⚪"
    ),
    StatusIcon = case(
        Status == "New", "🆕",
        Status == "InProgress", "⏳",
        Status == "Resolved", "✅",
        Status == "已解除", "❌",
        "⚪"
    ),
    ThreatType = case(
        AlertName has "Prompt", "💉 提示词注入",
        AlertName has "Jailbreak", "🚨 越狱攻击",
        AlertName has "模型", "🤖 模型威胁",
        AlertName has "Copilot", "🤝 Copilot滥用",
        AlertName has "注入", "💉 注入攻击",
        "⚠️ 其他威胁"
    )
| extend
    SeverityDisplay = strcat(SeverityIcon, " ", AlertSeverity),
    StatusDisplay = strcat(StatusIcon, " ", Status),
    SafeDescription = case(
        isnotempty(Description) and strlen(Description) > 80, 
        strcat(substring(Description, 0, 77), "..."),
        coalesce(Description, "无描述")
    ),
    // Preserve original timestamp for ordering
    OriginalTime = TimeGenerated
| project 
    ['时间'] = format_datetime(TimeGenerated, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['严重度'] = SeverityDisplay,
    ['威胁类型'] = ThreatType,
    ['告警名称'] = AlertName,
    ['目标实体'] = coalesce(CompromisedEntity, "未知"),
    ['状态'] = StatusDisplay,
    ['描述'] = SafeDescription,
    OriginalTime
| order by OriginalTime desc
| project-away OriginalTime

## 高风险AI模型监控
---

content.query:
// High-risk AI model analysis (updated)
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where AlertName has_any ("模型", "AI", "Copilot")
| extend ModelName = coalesce(
    tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties)["模型名称"]),
    tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties)["ModelName"]),
    extract(@"Model:\s*([^,\]]+)", 1, Description),
    "未知模型"
)
| where ModelName != "未知模型"
| summarize 
    AlertCount = count(),
    HighAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == "高"),
    MediumAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == "中"),
    LowAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == "低"),
    LastAlert = max(TimeGenerated),
    UniqueAlertTypes = dcount(AlertName),
    ThreatTypes = make_set(AlertName, 3)
  by ModelName
| extend
    // Directly compute risk score to avoid type conversions
    CalculatedRiskScore = HighAlerts * 3 + MediumAlerts * 2 + LowAlerts * 1,
    RiskLevel = case(
        HighAlerts >= 10, "🔥 严重",
        HighAlerts >= 5, "🔴 高",
        HighAlerts > 0 or MediumAlerts >= 10, "🟠 中",
        "🟢 低"
    )
| project 
    ['AI 模型'] = ModelName,
    ['风险级别'] = RiskLevel,
    ['风险评分'] = CalculatedRiskScore,
    ['总计告警'] = AlertCount,
    ['高-严重度告警'] = HighAlerts,
    ['中严重度告警'] = MediumAlerts,
    ['威胁多样性'] = UniqueAlertTypes,
    ['最近告警'] = format_datetime(LastAlert, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['重点威胁'] = tostring(ThreatTypes)
| order by ['风险评分'] desc

📈 AI使用分析

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：该视图通过追踪用户行为、部门采用率和应用分布来分析企业AI采用模式。帮助安全团队了解AI在组织中的渗透情况，发现潜在的影子IT或合规风险。

📈 使用指标

监控部门采用率、用户参与度及使用频率趋势

👤 用户画像

识别高频用户、异常模式及潜在高风险行为

---

content.query:
// AI application department adoption heatmap (real department only)
let userDept = union isfuzzy=true
(
    IdentityInfo
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, Department) by AccountUPN
    | project UserKey = tolower(AccountUPN), RealDepartment = tostring(Department)
),
(
    datatable(UserKey:string, RealDepartment:string)[]
);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName) and isnotempty(AppDisplayName)
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName), UserKey = tolower(UserPrincipalName)
| where AppNameLower has_any ('chat', 'copilot', 'ai', 'gpt', 'claude', 'bard', 'notion')
| join kind=leftouter userDept on UserKey
| extend Department = iff(isnotempty(RealDepartment), RealDepartment, '未配置部门')
| summarize 
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    TotalLogins = count(),
    LastUsed = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Department, AppDisplayName
| extend 
    UsageFrequency = round(todouble(TotalLogins) / todouble(UniqueUsers), 1),
    UsageLevel = case(
        UniqueUsers >= 50, '高采用率',
        UniqueUsers >= 20, '中采用率',
        UniqueUsers >= 5, '低采用率',
        '试点阶段'
    )
| project 
    ['部门'] = Department,
    ['AI 应用'] = AppDisplayName,
    ['用户数'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['总计登录'] = TotalLogins,
    ['使用频率'] = UsageFrequency,
    ['采用级别'] = UsageLevel,
    ['最后已使用'] = format_datetime(LastUsed, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['用户数'] desc

content.json:
📋 AI使用合规监控

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：该视图聚焦于AI应用的合规监控。分析企业AI策略遵循度、数据隐私风险及未授权应用使用情况，确保组织AI采用符合内外部要求，降低合规暴露面。

✅ 合规评估

评估部门AI使用合规性，发现未授权应用或高风险行为

🔒 隐私防护

监控AI工具中的敏感数据使用情况，突出潜在泄露风险

---

content.query:
// Enterprise AI usage compliance score (M365/Entra-only)
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where isnotempty(AppDisplayName) and isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName)
| where AppNameLower has_any ("copilot", "ai", "chat", "gpt", "cognitive", "openai", "bard", "claude", "assistant")
| extend 
    IsApproved = case(
        AppDisplayName has_any ("Microsoft", "Azure", "Copilot", "Bing Chat", "Office", "365") or
        AppDisplayName has_any ("Security Copilot", "AI Studio", "Cognitive"), 1, 0
    ),
    IsRestricted = case(
        AppDisplayName has_any ("ChatGPT", "Claude", "Google Bard", "Notion AI", "Jasper") and
        not (AppDisplayName has_any ("Enterprise", "业务", "Microsoft")), 1, 0
    ),
    DepartmentName = case(UserPrincipalName has '@', split(UserPrincipalName, '@')[1], "未知")
| summarize 
    TotalLogins = count(),
    ApprovedLogins = sum(IsApproved),
    RestrictedLogins = sum(IsRestricted),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName)
  by DepartmentName
| extend 
    ComplianceRate = case(TotalLogins > 0, round(todouble(ApprovedLogins) / todouble(TotalLogins) * 100.0, 1), 0.0),
    ViolationRate = case(TotalLogins > 0, round(todouble(RestrictedLogins) / todouble(TotalLogins) * 100.0, 1), 0.0)
| extend
    ComplianceLevel = case(
        ComplianceRate >= 90, "🟢 优秀",
        ComplianceRate >= 70, "🟡 良好",
        ComplianceRate >= 50, "🟠 需改进",
        "🔴 高风险"
    )
| project 
    ['部门'] = DepartmentName,
    ['合规级别'] = ComplianceLevel,
    ['合规率'] = strcat(tostring(ComplianceRate), "%"),
    ['违规率'] = strcat(tostring(ViolationRate), "%"),
    ['总计用户数'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['总计登录'] = TotalLogins,
    ['合规登录'] = ApprovedLogins,
    ['不合规登录'] = RestrictedLogins
| order by ['总计登录'] desc

content.query:
// Data privacy risk monitoring (revised)
let sensitiveKeywords = dynamic(["password", "ssn", "credit card", "personal", "confidential", "secret", "pii", "financial", "health"]);
let aiKeywords = dynamic(["AI", "Copilot", "ChatGPT", "模型", "Prompt", "OpenAI", "Claude", "Bard"]);

//  Fix 1: Expand data source coverage
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where AlertName has_any ("数据", "隐私", "泄露", "数据外泄", "敏感", "DLP", "信息") or
        Description has_any (sensitiveKeywords)
| extend 
    IsAIRelated = iif(Description has_any (aiKeywords) or AlertName has_any (aiKeywords), true, false),
    HasSensitiveData = iif(Description has_any (sensitiveKeywords) or AlertName has_any (sensitiveKeywords), true, false)
| extend RiskCategory = case(
    HasSensitiveData and IsAIRelated, " 高风险 - AI敏感数据",
    IsAIRelated, " 中风险 - AI相关",
    HasSensitiveData, " 敏感数据暴露",
    " 通用数据风险"
)
//  Fix 2: Do not limit to AI-only results; display all data risks
| summarize 
    IncidentCount = count(),
    HighRiskCount = countif(RiskCategory == " 高风险 - AI敏感数据"),
    LastIncident = max(TimeGenerated)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), RiskCategory
| render columnchart

content.query:
// Unapproved AI application detection (revised)
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}

| where AppDisplayName has_any ("chat", "ai", "gpt", "claude", "bard", "jasper", "notion", "openai", "anthropic", "perplexity") or

| where Application has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "ChatGPT", "OpenAI", "Azure AI") or

    ),

        RawEventData has "ConfidentialData" or ActivityObjects has "Confidential", "机密数据共享",

    ['用户数涉及'] = tostring(Users),

content.json:
⚠️ AI风险评估与预测

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值主张**：构建多维AI风险评估框架，利用历史数据与机器学习预测新兴AI安全风险与威胁趋势。为安全团队提供前瞻性防护策略、优化资源分配和更强的事件响应能力。

📊 风险矩阵

通过多因素风险模型量化AI安全暴露面

🔮 预测性分析

从历史趋势预测未来威胁方向

---

content.query:
// Multi-dimensional AI risk assessment matrix (real-time)
// Extract and quantify risk dimensions from live alerts
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
let weightTable = datatable(Factor:string, Weight:real, RiskCategory:string)[
  '提示词注入', 0.25, '技术威胁',
  '模型访问违规', 0.20, '访问控制',
  '数据外泄', 0.25, '数据安全',
  '未授权使用', 0.15, '合规风险',
  '合规违规', 0.15, '策略风险'
];
let alerts = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, Description, AlertSeverity, CompromisedEntity
| extend SevWeight = case(AlertSeverity=='严重',4, AlertSeverity=='高',3, AlertSeverity=='中',2, AlertSeverity=='低',1, 0)
| extend Factor = case(
    AlertName has 'prompt' or Description has 'prompt' or AlertName has 'injection' or Description has 'injection' or AlertName has 'jailbreak' or Description has 'jailbreak', '提示词注入',
    AlertName has_any ('access','permission','token','key','credential','privilege') or Description has_any ('access','permission','token','key','credential','privilege'), '模型访问违规',
    AlertName has_any ('exfiltration','leak','dlp') or Description has_any ('exfiltration','leak','dlp'), '数据外泄',
    AlertName has_any ('unauthorized','unapproved','shadow') or Description has_any ('unauthorized','unapproved','shadow'), '未授权使用',
    AlertName has_any ('compliance','policy','gdpr','pii') or Description has_any ('compliance','policy','gdpr','pii'), '合规违规',
    '其他'
);
let perFactor = alerts
| where Factor != '其他'
| summarize IncidentCount = count(), SevScore = sum(SevWeight), UniqueEntities = dcount(CompromisedEntity) by Factor
| join kind=rightouter weightTable on Factor
| extend DescriptionText = case(
  Factor=='提示词注入','Prompt injection attack risk',
  Factor=='模型访问违规','模型访问违规',
  Factor=='数据外泄','数据外泄风险',
  Factor=='未授权使用','未授权使用暴露',
  Factor=='合规违规','合规违规',
  '其他'
)
| extend BaseScore = toint(coalesce(SevScore, 0))
| extend WeightedScore = toreal(BaseScore) * Weight
| extend RiskLevel = case(
    WeightedScore >= 40, "🔥 严重",
    WeightedScore >= 20, "🔴 高",
    WeightedScore >= 10, "🟠 中等",
    "🟢 低"
)
| extend WeightDisplay = strcat(tostring(toint(Weight * 100)), '%')
| project 
  ['风险因子'] = Factor,
  ['权重'] = WeightDisplay,
  ['描述'] = DescriptionText,
  ['风险类别'] = RiskCategory,
  ['基础评分'] = BaseScore,
  ['加权评分'] = round(WeightedScore, 2),
  ['风险级别'] = RiskLevel;
perFactor
| union (
  // Overall assessment aggregated from all factors
  perFactor
  | summarize TotalBase = toint(sum(['基础评分'])), TotalWeighted = sum(['加权评分'])
  | extend ['风险因子'] = '📊 Overall Risk Score', ['权重'] = '100%', ['描述'] = '所有风险因子的聚合视图', ['风险类别'] = 'Overall Assessment', ['基础评分'] = TotalBase, ['加权评分'] = round(TotalWeighted, 2), ['风险级别'] = case(TotalWeighted >= 40, "🔥 严重", TotalWeighted >= 20, "🔴 高", TotalWeighted >= 10, "🟠 中等", "🟢 低")
  | project ['风险因子'], ['权重'], ['描述'], ['风险类别'], ['基础评分'], ['加权评分'], ['风险级别']
)
| order by ['加权评分'] desc

content.query:
// AI risk trend forecast
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| where AlertName has_any ("AI", "模型", "Prompt", "Copilot")
| summarize 
    DailyAlerts = count(),
    HighSeverityAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == "高")
  by Date = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| extend 
    RiskScore = DailyAlerts * 1.0 + HighSeverityAlerts * 2.0,
    DayOfWeek = dayofweek(Date),
    WeekOfYear = week_of_year(Date)
| order by Date asc
| extend 
    MovingAvg = round(RiskScore, 1),
    Trend = case(
        RiskScore > prev(RiskScore, 1) * 1.2, " 快速增长",
        RiskScore < prev(RiskScore, 1) * 0.8, " 快速下降",
        " 稳定波动"
    )
| project Date, RiskScore, MovingAvg, Trend
| render timechart

content.query:
// Risk incident impact assessment
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where AlertName has_any ("模型", "Prompt", "AI", "Copilot")
| extend 
    ImpactLevel = case(
        AlertSeverity == "高" and CompromisedEntity has_any ("admin", "service"), "🔥 严重影响",
        AlertSeverity == "高", "🔴 高影响",
        AlertSeverity == "中", "🟠 中等影响",
        "🟢 低影响"
    ),
    BusinessImpact = case(
        AlertName has "数据外泄" or AlertName has "泄露", "💼 业务数据风险",
        AlertName has "访问" or AlertName has "Privilege", "🔐 访问控制风险",
        AlertName has "Compliance" or AlertName has "Policy", "⚖️ 合规风险",
        AlertName has "Performance" or AlertName has "可用性", "⚡ 性能影响",
        "🔧 技术风险"
    )
| summarize 
    IncidentCount = count(),
    AffectedEntities = dcount(CompromisedEntity),
    LatestIncident = max(TimeGenerated)
  by ImpactLevel, BusinessImpact
| project 
    ['影响级别'] = ImpactLevel,
    ['业务影响类型'] = BusinessImpact,
    ['事件数量'] = IncidentCount,
    ['受影响实体'] = AffectedEntities,
    ['最近事件时间'] = format_datetime(LatestIncident, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['事件数量'] desc

//  Insider Risk Management - AI Data Abuse Detection (M365 full stack + Entra + Azure)
// Data sources: Purview, MDO, MDE, MDI, MDA, Entra ID
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
union isfuzzy=true
    (
    // Purview Insider Risk signals
    PurviewAuditLogs
    | extend EventTime = todatetime(coalesce(column_ifexists('TimeGenerated', datetime(null)), column_ifexists('Timestamp', datetime(null))))
    | where EventTime > t0
    | where tostring(column_ifexists('OperationName','')) has_any ("InsiderRisk", "RiskyUser", "DataExfiltration", "AnomalousAccess")
        or tostring(column_ifexists('RawEventData','')) has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "OpenAI", "model", "dataset")
    | extend
        Source = "Purview内部风险",
        RiskType = case(
            tostring(column_ifexists('OperationName','')) has "数据外泄", "AI数据外泄",
            tostring(column_ifexists('OperationName','')) has "AnomalousAccess", "异常AI访问",
            tostring(column_ifexists('OperationName','')) has "RiskyUser", "高风险用户活动",
            "其他内部风险"
        ),
        RiskLevel = case(
            tostring(column_ifexists('ResultStatus','')) has "高" or tostring(column_ifexists('OperationName','')) has "数据外泄", "严重",
            tostring(column_ifexists('ResultStatus','')) has "中", "高",
            "中"
        ),
        UserPrincipal = tostring(column_ifexists('UserId','未知')),
        Details = tostring(column_ifexists('RawEventData',''))
    | project TimeGenerated = EventTime, Source, RiskType, RiskLevel, UserPrincipal, Details
    ),
    (
    // Entra ID risky AI sign-ins
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where AppDisplayName has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "ChatGPT", "OpenAI", "Azure AI")
    | where RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high" or RiskLevelAggregated == "high" or RiskState in ("atRisk", "confirmedCompromised")
    | extend
        Source = "Entra ID风险检测",
        RiskType = case(
            tostring(RiskEventTypes) has "anonymizedIPAddress", "匿名IP使用",
            tostring(RiskEventTypes) has "maliciousIPAddress", "恶意IP访问",
            tostring(RiskEventTypes) has "unfamiliarFeatures", "陌生位置",
            tostring(RiskEventTypes) has "impossibleTravel", "不可能旅行",
            "未知风险模式"
        ),
        RiskLevel = case(RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high" or RiskLevelAggregated == "high", "严重", "高"),
        UserPrincipal = UserPrincipalName,
        Details = strcat("App: ", AppDisplayName, ", 位置：", Location, ", IP: ", IPAddress)
    | project TimeGenerated, Source, RiskType, RiskLevel, UserPrincipal, Details
    ),
    (
    // MDE suspicious AI/model file activity
    DeviceFileEvents
    | extend EventTime = todatetime(coalesce(column_ifexists('TimeGenerated', datetime(null)), column_ifexists('Timestamp', datetime(null))))
    | where EventTime > t0
    | where tostring(column_ifexists('FileName','')) has_any (".h5", ".pkl", ".pt", ".onnx", "model", "training", "dataset")
    | where tostring(column_ifexists('ActionType','')) has_any ("FileCreated", "FileModified", "FileRenamed")
    | where tostring(column_ifexists('FolderPath','')) has_any ("Downloads", "临时", "USB", "OneDrive", "可移动")
    | extend
        Source = "MDE - 设备文件信号",
        RiskType = case(
            tostring(column_ifexists('FolderPath','')) has_any ("USB", "可移动"), "AI模型至可移动媒介",
            tostring(column_ifexists('FolderPath','')) has "临时", "AI模型至临时文件夹",
            tostring(column_ifexists('FolderPath','')) has "Downloads", "AI模型下载",
            "可疑文件活动"
        ),
        RiskLevel = case(
            tostring(column_ifexists('FolderPath','')) has_any ("USB", "可移动"), "严重",
            tostring(column_ifexists('FileName','')) has_any (".h5", ".pkl", ".pt"), "高",
            "中"
        ),
        UserPrincipal = tostring(column_ifexists('InitiatingProcessAccountName','未知')),
        Details = strcat("文件：", tostring(column_ifexists('FileName','')), ", 路径：", tostring(column_ifexists('FolderPath','')), ", 设备：", tostring(column_ifexists('DeviceName','')))
    | project TimeGenerated = EventTime, Source, RiskType, RiskLevel, UserPrincipal, Details
    ),
    (
    // MDO suspicious email patterns around AI prompts/data leakage
    EmailEvents
    | extend EventTime = todatetime(coalesce(column_ifexists('TimeGenerated', datetime(null)), column_ifexists('Timestamp', datetime(null))))
    | where EventTime > t0
    | where tostring(column_ifexists('Subject','')) has_any ("ai", "copilot", "prompt", "openai", "model")
        or tostring(column_ifexists('ThreatTypes','')) has_any ("phish", "malware", "spam")
    | extend
        Source = "MDO - 邮件威胁信号",
        RiskType = case(
            tostring(column_ifexists('ThreatTypes','')) has "phish", "AI钓鱼攻击",
            tostring(column_ifexists('ThreatTypes','')) has "malware", "恶意软件投递",
            tostring(column_ifexists('Subject','')) has_any ("prompt", "model", "dataset"), "AI数据邮件暴露",
            "可疑AI相关邮件"
        ),
        RiskLevel = case(
            tostring(column_ifexists('ThreatTypes','')) has_any ("malware", "phish"), "高",
            tostring(column_ifexists('DeliveryAction','')) has_any ("Blocked", "已隔离"), "中",
            "低"
        ),
        UserPrincipal = tostring(column_ifexists('RecipientEmailAddress','未知')),
        Details = strcat("发件人：", tostring(column_ifexists('SenderFromAddress','')), ", 主体：", tostring(column_ifexists('Subject','')))
    | project TimeGenerated = EventTime, Source, RiskType, RiskLevel, UserPrincipal, Details
    ),
    (
    // MDA cloud app exfiltration / risky activity
    CloudAppEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where ActionType has_any ("FileDownloaded", "FileUploaded", "DlpRuleMatch", "DLPViolation")
    | where ObjectName has_any ("ai", "model", "dataset", "prompt", "copilot") or Application has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "OpenAI")
    | extend
        Source = "MDA - 云应用信号",
        RiskType = case(
            ActionType has_any ("DlpRuleMatch", "DLPViolation"), "AI工作流DLP违规",
            ActionType == "FileDownloaded", "潜在数据外泄",
            ActionType == "FileUploaded", "潜在数据注入",
            "可疑云端AI活动"
        ),
        RiskLevel = case(
            ActionType has_any ("DlpRuleMatch", "DLPViolation"), "高",
            ActionType == "FileDownloaded", "中",
            "低"
        ),
        UserPrincipal = tostring(coalesce(column_ifexists('AccountDisplayName',''), column_ifexists('AccountObjectId','未知'))),
        Details = strcat("App: ", tostring(Application), ", 操作：", tostring(ActionType), ", 对象：", tostring(ObjectName))
    | project TimeGenerated, Source, RiskType, RiskLevel, UserPrincipal, Details
    ),
    (
    // MDI risky identity activity around AI access
    IdentityLogonEvents
    | extend EventTime = todatetime(coalesce(column_ifexists('TimeGenerated', datetime(null)), column_ifexists('Timestamp', datetime(null))))
    | where EventTime > t0
    | where tostring(column_ifexists('应用','')) has_any ("ai", "copilot", "openai", "azure ai")
        or tostring(column_ifexists('AdditionalFields','')) has_any ("impossible", "anonymous", "risky")
    | extend
        Source = "MDI - 身份信号",
        RiskType = case(
            tostring(column_ifexists('AdditionalFields','')) has "impossible", "不可能旅行",
            tostring(column_ifexists('AdditionalFields','')) has "anonymous", "匿名访问",
            "可疑身份访问"
        ),
        RiskLevel = case(
            tostring(column_ifexists('AdditionalFields','')) has_any ("impossible", "anonymous", "high"), "高",
            "中"
        ),
        UserPrincipal = tostring(coalesce(column_ifexists('AccountUpn',''), column_ifexists('AccountName','未知'))),
        Details = strcat("应用：", tostring(column_ifexists('应用','')), ", 设备：", tostring(column_ifexists('DeviceName','')))
    | project TimeGenerated = EventTime, Source, RiskType, RiskLevel, UserPrincipal, Details
    )
| summarize
    RiskEventCount = count(),
    CriticalCount = countif(RiskLevel == "严重"),
    HighCount = countif(RiskLevel == "高"),
    MediumCount = countif(RiskLevel == "中"),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipal),
    UserList = make_set(UserPrincipal, 5),
    SampleDetails = make_set(Details, 2),
    FirstEvent = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastEvent = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Source, RiskType, RiskLevel
| extend ThreatScore = (CriticalCount * 5) + (HighCount * 3) + (MediumCount * 2)
| extend InsiderThreatLevel = case(
        ThreatScore >= 20, " 严重内部威胁",
        ThreatScore >= 10, " 高内部风险",
        ThreatScore >= 5, " 中内部风险",
        " 低风险"
    )
| project
    ['内部人员威胁级别'] = InsiderThreatLevel,
    ['检测来源'] = Source,
    ['风险类型'] = RiskType,
    ['严重度'] = RiskLevel,
    ['威胁评分'] = ThreatScore,
    ['总计事件'] = RiskEventCount,
    ['严重事件'] = CriticalCount,
    ['高风险事件'] = HighCount,
    ['中风险事件'] = MediumCount,
    ['唯一用户数'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['用户数涉及'] = tostring(UserList),
    ['事件示例'] = tostring(SampleDetails),
    ['首次检测'] = format_datetime(FirstEvent, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后检测'] = format_datetime(LastEvent, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['威胁评分'] desc, ['总计事件'] desc

        Location == "IT", "意大利",
        Location == "ES", "西班牙",
        Location == "NL", "荷兰",
        Location == "SE", "瑞典",
        Location == "NO", "挪威",
        Location == "DK", "丹麦",
        Location == "FI", "芬兰",
        Location
    )
    | where isnotempty(Country) and Country != ""
    | summarize UsageCount = count() by Country
) on Country
| extend 
    FinalCountry = coalesce(Country, Country1),
    FinalThreatCount = coalesce(ThreatCount, 0),
    FinalUsageCount = coalesce(UsageCount, 0)
| where isnotempty(FinalCountry) and FinalCountry != ""
| extend 
    RiskRatio = round(todouble(FinalThreatCount) / todouble(FinalUsageCount + 1) * 100, 2),
    RiskLevel = case(
        FinalThreatCount > 0 and FinalUsageCount == 0, "🔥 纯威胁来源",
        round(todouble(FinalThreatCount) / todouble(FinalUsageCount + 1) * 100, 2) >= 10, "🔴 极端风险",
        round(todouble(FinalThreatCount) / todouble(FinalUsageCount + 1) * 100, 2) >= 5, "🟠 高风险",
        round(todouble(FinalThreatCount) / todouble(FinalUsageCount + 1) * 100, 2) >= 2, "🟡 中等风险",
        FinalUsageCount > 0, "🟢 低风险",
        "⚪ 无数据"
    )
| order by FinalThreatCount desc, RiskRatio desc
| project 
    ['国家'] = FinalCountry,
    ['威胁事件'] = FinalThreatCount,
    ['AI 使用数量'] = FinalUsageCount,
    ['风险占比'] = strcat(tostring(RiskRatio), "%"),
    ['风险级别'] = RiskLevel
| take 25

// Cross-border AI threat correlation analysis
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where AlertName has_any ("模型", "Prompt", "AI", "Copilot")
| extend 
    // Extract source country information from multiple fields
    ExtractedSourceCountry = coalesce(
        tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0].Location.CountryName),
        tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0].Location.Country),
        tostring(parse_json(tostring(ExtendedProperties))["SourceCountry"]),
        tostring(parse_json(tostring(ExtendedProperties))["Country"]),
        extract(@"Country[:\s]*([A-Za-z\s]+)", 1, tostring(Description)),
        extract(@"from\s+([A-Za-z\s]+)", 1, tostring(Description)),
        "未知"
    ),
    // Normalize target entity details
    CleanTargetEntity = coalesce(
        tostring(CompromisedEntity),
        tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0].Name),
        tostring(parse_json(tostring(ExtendedProperties))["TargetResource"]),
        "未知目标"
    )
| where ExtractedSourceCountry != "未知" and isnotempty(ExtractedSourceCountry)
| where CleanTargetEntity != "未知目标" and isnotempty(CleanTargetEntity)
| extend 
    SourceCountry = case(
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "美国" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "US", "🇺🇸 美国",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "中国" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "CN", "🇨🇳 中国",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "俄罗斯" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "RU", "🇷🇺 俄罗斯",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "Iran" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "IR", "🇮🇷 伊朗",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "朝鲜" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "KP", "🇰🇵 朝鲜",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "德国" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "DE", "🇩🇪 德国",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "法国" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "FR", "🇫🇷 法国",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "英国" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "GB", "🇬🇧 英国",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "日本" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "JP", "🇯🇵 日本",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "印度" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "IN", "🇮🇳 印度",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "巴西" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "BR", "🇧🇷 巴西",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "澳大利亚" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "AU", "🇦🇺 澳大利亚",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "加拿大" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "CA", "🇨🇦 加拿大",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "韩国" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "KR", "🇰🇷 韩国",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "Israel" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "IL", "🇮🇱 以色列",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "荷兰" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "NL", "🇳🇱 荷兰",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "西班牙" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "ES", "🇪🇸 西班牙",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "意大利" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "IT", "🇮🇹 意大利",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "Mexico" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "MX", "🇲🇽 墨西哥",
        ExtractedSourceCountry has "新加坡" or ExtractedSourceCountry == "SG", "🇸🇬 新加坡",
        strcat("🌍 ", ExtractedSourceCountry)
    )
| summarize 
    AttackCount = count(),
    UniqueTargets = dcount(CleanTargetEntity),
    HighSeverityAttacks = countif(AlertSeverity == "高"),
    AttackMethods = make_set(AlertName, 5),
    TargetTypes = make_set(CleanTargetEntity, 5),
    FirstAttack = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttack = max(TimeGenerated)
  by SourceCountry
| extend 
    AttackIntensity = round(todouble(AttackCount) / todouble(datetime_diff('day', LastAttack, FirstAttack) + 1), 2),
    ThreatLevel = case(
        HighSeverityAttacks >= 20, "🔥 国家级严重威胁",
        HighSeverityAttacks >= 10 or AttackCount >= 50, "🔴 高级持续威胁",
        HighSeverityAttacks >= 5 or AttackCount >= 20, "🟠 升级威胁",
        AttackCount >= 10, "🟡 低级威胁",
        "🟢 零星活动"
    )
| project 
    ['来源国家'] = SourceCountry,
    ['威胁级别'] = ThreatLevel,
    ['总计攻击'] = AttackCount,
    ['高-严重度攻击'] = HighSeverityAttacks,
    ['目标数量'] = UniqueTargets,
    ['攻击强度/天'] = AttackIntensity,
    ['首次攻击'] = format_datetime(FirstAttack, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最近攻击'] = format_datetime(LastAttack, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['攻击方法'] = tostring(AttackMethods),
    ['目标类型'] = tostring(TargetTypes)
| order by ['总计攻击'] desc, ['高-严重度攻击'] desc
| take 20

content.json:
🔐 AI API安全监控

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值主张**：聚焦于AI API安全监控与异常检测，通过分析调用模式、发现异常行为和追踪威胁事件，帮助安全团队保护AI服务端点免受误用、DDoS攻击和恶意调用。

🔍 异常检测

实时监控AI API异常，识别恶意流量与攻击模式

⚡ 性能监控

追踪API响应时间、错误率与可用性健康度

---

content.query:
// AI API anomaly detection analysis (SecurityAlert-based)
let aiApiKeywords = dynamic(["openai", "chat", "copilot", "ai", "gpt", "completions", "embeddings"]);

SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where AlertName has_any (aiApiKeywords) or Description has_any (aiApiKeywords)
| extend 
    Hour = bin(TimeGenerated, 1h),
    IsHighSeverity = iff(AlertSeverity == "高", 1, 0),
    IsMediumSeverity = iff(AlertSeverity == "中", 1, 0),
    IsAPIThreat = iff(AlertName has_any ("API", "端点", "请求", "响应"), 1, 0)
| summarize 
    HourlyAlertCount = count(),
    HighSeverityCount = sum(IsHighSeverity),
    MediumSeverityCount = sum(IsMediumSeverity),
    APIThreatCount = sum(IsAPIThreat),
    UniqueAlertTypes = dcount(AlertName),
    AffectedEntities = dcount(CompromisedEntity)
  by Hour
| extend 
    SeverityRate = round(todouble(HighSeverityCount) / todouble(HourlyAlertCount) * 100, 2),
    BaselineAlerts = 5.0,
    BaselineSeverityRate = 20.0
| extend 
    VolumeAnomaly = case(
        HourlyAlertCount > BaselineAlerts * 3, "🔴 告警激增",
        HourlyAlertCount < BaselineAlerts * 0.3 and HourlyAlertCount > 0, "🟡 告警下降",
        HourlyAlertCount > 0, "🟢 正常",
        "⚪ 无告警"
    ),
    SeverityAnomaly = case(
        SeverityRate > BaselineSeverityRate * 2, "🔴 高严重度异常",
        SeverityRate > 0, "🟢 正常",
        "⚪ 无高严重度告警"
    ),
    ThreatActivity = case(
        APIThreatCount > 0, "🔴 活跃API威胁",
        "🟢 正常"
    )
| extend 
    OverallRisk = case(
        VolumeAnomaly has "Spike" or SeverityAnomaly has "异常" or ThreatActivity has "Threat", "🔴 高风险",
        VolumeAnomaly has "Drop", "🟡 需关注",
        HourlyAlertCount > 0, "🟢 正常监控",
        "⚪ 平静期"
    )
| project 
    ['时间窗口'] = format_datetime(Hour, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['风险级别'] = OverallRisk,
    ['告警数量'] = HourlyAlertCount,
    ['告警状态'] = VolumeAnomaly,
    ['高-严重度率'] = strcat(tostring(SeverityRate), "%"),
    ['严重度状态'] = SeverityAnomaly,
    ['API 威胁活动'] = ThreatActivity,
    ['告警类型数量'] = UniqueAlertTypes,
    ['受影响实体'] = AffectedEntities
| order by ['时间窗口'] desc
| take 24
content.title: 🔍 AI API - 24小时总览

content.query:
// AI API threat intelligence and attack pattern analysis
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where AlertName has_any ("API", "注入", "滥用", "异常", "DDoS", "暴力破解")
| where Description has_any ("AI", "OpenAI", "Cognitive", "API", "model", "completions", "embeddings")
| extend 
    ThreatCategory = case(
        AlertName has "注入" or Description has "injection", "💉 API注入攻击",
        AlertName has "暴力破解" or AlertName has "brute", "🔨 暴力破解",
        AlertName has "DDoS" or AlertName has "flood", "💥 DDoS攻击",
        AlertName has "异常" or AlertName has "unusual", "🔍 异常行为",
        AlertName has "滥用" or AlertName has "misuse", "🔌 API滥用",
        "⚠️ 其他威胁"
    ),
    SeverityLevel = case(
        AlertSeverity == "高", "🔴 高",
        AlertSeverity == "中", "🟠 中",
        AlertSeverity == "低", "🟡 低",
        "ℹ️ 信息性"
    ),
    TargetAPI = case(
        CompromisedEntity has "completions" or Description has "completions", "文本补全API",
        CompromisedEntity has "chat" or Description has "chat", "聊天补全API",
        CompromisedEntity has "embeddings" or Description has "embeddings", "嵌入向量API",
        CompromisedEntity has "openai" or Description has "openai", "OpenAI API",
        CompromisedEntity has "cognitive" or Description has "cognitive", "认知服务",
        coalesce(CompromisedEntity, "未知目标")
    ),
    AttackSource = case(
        Description has "中国" or Description has "CN", "🇨🇳 中国",
        Description has "俄罗斯" or Description has "RU", "🇷🇺 俄罗斯",
        Description has "Iran" or Description has "IR", "🇮🇷 伊朗",
        Description has "朝鲜" or Description has "KP", "🇰🇵 朝鲜",
        Description has "美国" or Description has "US", "🇺🇸 美国",
        "🌐 其他/未知"
    )
| extend 
    CalculatedRiskScore = case(
        AlertSeverity == "高" and ThreatCategory has "注入", 95,
        AlertSeverity == "高" and ThreatCategory has "DDoS", 90,
        AlertSeverity == "高", 80,
        AlertSeverity == "中" and ThreatCategory has "暴力破解", 70,
        AlertSeverity == "中", 60,
        AlertSeverity == "低", 40,
        20
    )
| extend
    ImpactLevel = case(
        CalculatedRiskScore >= 90, "🔥 严重影响",
        CalculatedRiskScore >= 70, "🔴 高影响",
        CalculatedRiskScore >= 50, "🟠 中等影响",
        "🟢 轻微影响"
    )
| project 
    ['检测到时间'] = format_datetime(TimeGenerated, 'MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    ['威胁类别'] = ThreatCategory,
    ['严重度'] = SeverityLevel,
    ['影响评估'] = ImpactLevel,
    ['风险评分'] = CalculatedRiskScore,
    ['目标 API'] = TargetAPI,
    ['攻击来源'] = AttackSource,
    ['告警名称'] = AlertName,
    ['受影响实体'] = CompromisedEntity,
    ['告警状态'] = Status,
    ['响应建议'] = case(
        ThreatCategory has "注入", "立即审查输入验证和参数过滤",
        ThreatCategory has "暴力破解", "启用IP限流和账户锁定策略",
        ThreatCategory has "DDoS", "激活DDoS防护和流量限制",
        ThreatCategory has "异常行为", "调查用户行为和调用模式",
        ThreatCategory has "API滥用", "审查API使用策略和配额设置",
        "遵循标准事件响应流程"
    )
| order by ['风险评分'] desc, ['检测到时间'] desc
| take 20

content.query:
// AI service configuration change monitoring (multi-source)
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
let auditChanges =
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| extend TargetResourcesText = tostring(TargetResources), AdditionalDetailsText = tostring(AdditionalDetails)
| where OperationName has_any ('添加', '更新', '删除', '修改', '创建', '移除', '授权', '撤销', 'Add', 'Update', 'Delete', 'Create', 'Remove', 'Grant', 'Consent', 'Assign', 'Write', 'Patch')
| where TargetResourcesText has_any ('cognitive', 'openai', 'machinelearning', 'bot', 'ai', 'copilot', 'microsoft.cognitiveservices')
    or AdditionalDetailsText has_any ('CognitiveServices', 'OpenAI', 'MachineLearning', 'BotService', 'Copilot')
    or Category == 'ApplicationManagement'
| extend
    ResourceName = coalesce(tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName), tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), tostring(TargetResources[0].id), '未知资源'),
    Actor = coalesce(tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName), tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalName), '系统操作'),
    SourceIP = coalesce(tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress), tostring(InitiatedBy.app.ipAddress), 'IP未记录'),
    Operation = tostring(OperationName),
    ResultStatus = tostring(Result)
| extend
    AIServiceType = case(
        TargetResourcesText has 'cognitive' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'CognitiveServices', ' 认知服务',
        TargetResourcesText has 'openai' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'OpenAI', ' Azure OpenAI',
        TargetResourcesText has 'machinelearning' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'MachineLearning', ' 机器学习',
        TargetResourcesText has 'bot' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'BotService', ' 机器人服务',
        TargetResourcesText has 'copilot' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'Copilot', ' Microsoft Copilot',
        Category == 'ApplicationManagement', ' 应用管理',
        ' 其他服务'
    ),
    RiskLevel = case(
        Operation has_any ('删除', '移除', '撤销', 'Delete', 'Remove'), ' 高风险操作',
        Operation has_any ('授权', '添加', 'Grant', 'Consent', 'Assign') and TargetResourcesText has_any ('admin', 'owner', 'contributor'), ' 权限提升',
        Operation has_any ('更新', '修改', 'Update', 'Patch') and TargetResourcesText has_any ('key', 'secret', 'credential'), ' 敏感变更',
        Operation has_any ('创建', '添加', 'Create', 'Add', 'Write'), ' 资源创建',
        ' 常规操作'
    ),
    ChangeDetails = case(
        Operation has_any ('添加', 'Add', 'Create'), strcat('Added: ', tostring(TargetResources[0].type)),
        Operation has_any ('删除', 'Delete', 'Remove'), strcat('Deleted: ', tostring(TargetResources[0].type)),
        Operation has_any ('授权', 'Grant', 'Consent', 'Assign'), strcat('Permission Action: ', Operation),
        strcat('Operation: ', Operation)
    )
| project TimeGenerated, AIServiceType, ResourceName, OperationName = Operation, RiskLevel, Actor, SourceIP, ChangeDetails, Result = ResultStatus;
let azureChanges =
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where ResourceProviderValue has_any ('Microsoft.CognitiveServices', 'Microsoft.OpenAI', 'Microsoft.MachineLearningServices', 'Microsoft.BotService')
    or ResourceId has_any ('cognitive', 'openai', 'machinelearning', 'bot', 'copilot')
| extend
    Operation = coalesce(tostring(OperationNameValue), tostring(OperationName)),
    ResourceName = coalesce(tostring(Resource), tostring(split(ResourceId, '/')[array_length(split(ResourceId, '/')) - 1]), '未知资源'),
    Actor = coalesce(tostring(Caller), '系统操作'),
    SourceIP = coalesce(tostring(CallerIpAddress), 'IP未记录'),
    ResultStatus = coalesce(tostring(ActivityStatusValue), tostring(ActivityStatus), '未知')
| extend
    AIServiceType = case(
        tostring(ResourceProviderValue) has 'CognitiveServices', ' 认知服务',
        tostring(ResourceProviderValue) has 'OpenAI', ' Azure OpenAI',
        tostring(ResourceProviderValue) has 'MachineLearningServices', ' 机器学习',
        tostring(ResourceProviderValue) has 'BotService', ' 机器人服务',
        ' 其他服务'
    ),
    RiskLevel = case(
        Operation has_any ('Delete', 'Remove'), ' 高风险操作',
        Operation has_any ('Write', 'Create'), ' 资源创建',
        Operation has_any ('Update', 'Patch'), ' 敏感变更',
        ' 常规操作'
    ),
    ChangeDetails = strcat('Source: AzureActivity, RG: ', coalesce(tostring(ResourceGroup), '-'))
| project TimeGenerated, AIServiceType, ResourceName, OperationName = Operation, RiskLevel, Actor, SourceIP, ChangeDetails, Result = ResultStatus;
union isfuzzy=true auditChanges, azureChanges
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
| project
    ['时间戳'] = format_datetime(TimeGenerated, 'MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    ['AI 服务类型'] = AIServiceType,
    ['资源名称'] = ResourceName,
    ['操作类型'] = OperationName,
    ['风险级别'] = RiskLevel,
    ['操作主体'] = Actor,
    ['来源 IP 地址'] = SourceIP,
    ['变更详情'] = ChangeDetails,
    ['操作结果'] = Result
content.title: ⚙️ AI 服务配置变更监控

content.query:
// AI API security monitoring (Sentinel-resilient: AppService + AzureDiagnostics)
let aiApiEndpoints = dynamic([
    'openai.azure.com', 'api.openai.com', 'cognitive.microsoft.com',
    '/chat/completions', '/completions', '/embeddings', '/models',
    'copilot', 'ai-studio', 'machinelearning', 'cognitiveservices'
]);
let apiLogs = union isfuzzy=true
(
    AppServiceHTTPLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
    | project TimeGenerated, Host=tostring(column_ifexists('CsHost','')), Uri=tostring(column_ifexists('CsUriStem','')), StatusCode=toint(column_ifexists('ScStatus', 0)), ClientIp=tostring(column_ifexists('CIp','')), RespTimeMs=toreal(column_ifexists('TimeTaken', 0.0))
),
(
    AzureDiagnostics
    | where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
    | project TimeGenerated,
        Host=tostring(coalesce(column_ifexists('host_s',''), column_ifexists('Resource',''))),
        Uri=tostring(coalesce(column_ifexists('requestUri_s',''), column_ifexists('operation_Name',''), column_ifexists('Category',''))),
        StatusCode=toint(coalesce(column_ifexists('httpStatusCode_d', 0), column_ifexists('responseCode_d', 0), column_ifexists('statusCode_d', 0))),
        ClientIp=tostring(coalesce(column_ifexists('clientIP_s',''), column_ifexists('callerIpAddress_s',''), column_ifexists('CallerIpAddress',''))),
        RespTimeMs=toreal(coalesce(column_ifexists('durationMs_d', 0.0), column_ifexists('serverLatencyMs_d', 0.0), 0.0))
),
(
    datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Host:string, Uri:string, StatusCode:int, ClientIp:string, RespTimeMs:real)[]
)
;
apiLogs
| where Host has_any (aiApiEndpoints) or Uri has_any (aiApiEndpoints)
| extend
    APIEndpoint = case(
        Uri has '/chat/completions', ' 聊天补全',
        Uri has '/completions', '  文本补全',
        Uri has '/embeddings', ' 嵌入向量',
        Uri has '/models', ' 模型',
        Host has 'openai.azure.com', ' Azure OpenAI',
        Host has 'api.openai.com', ' OpenAI API',
        Host has 'cognitive.microsoft.com', ' 认知服务',
        ' 其他AI API'
    ),
    SecurityRisk = case(
        StatusCode == 401 or StatusCode == 403, ' 高风险',
        StatusCode == 429, ' 中风险',
        StatusCode > 0 and StatusCode < 300, ' 正常',
        ' 需关注'
    )
| summarize
    CallCount = count(),
    SuccessRate = round(todouble(countif(StatusCode > 0 and StatusCode < 300)) / todouble(count()) * 100, 1),
    AuthFailures = countif(StatusCode == 401),
    AuthzFailures = countif(StatusCode == 403),
    RateLimited = countif(StatusCode == 429),
    UniqueClients = dcount(ClientIp),
    AvgResponseTime = round(avg(RespTimeMs), 2),
    LastActivity = max(TimeGenerated)
  by APIEndpoint, SecurityRisk
| project
    ['API 终结点'] = APIEndpoint,
    ['安全状态'] = SecurityRisk,
    ['调用数'] = CallCount,
    ['成功率 %'] = SuccessRate,
    ['认证失败数'] = AuthFailures,
    ['授权失败数'] = AuthzFailures,
    ['率限制命中数'] = RateLimited,
    ['唯一客户端'] = UniqueClients,
    ['平均响应时间'] = AvgResponseTime,
    ['最后活动'] = format_datetime(LastActivity, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['调用数'] desc
content.title: 🔐 AI API 安全监控

        ClientIp=tostring(coalesce(column_ifexists('clientIP_s',''), column_ifexists('callerIpAddress_s',''), column_ifexists('CallerIpAddress',''))),
        RespTimeMs=toreal(coalesce(column_ifexists('durationMs_d', 0.0), column_ifexists('serverLatencyMs_d', 0.0), 0.0)),
        Bytes=tolong(coalesce(column_ifexists('responseBodySize_d', 0), column_ifexists('requestBodySize_d', 0), 0))
),
(
    datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Host:string, Uri:string, StatusCode:int, ClientIp:string, RespTimeMs:real, Bytes:long)[]
)
;
apiPerf
| where Host has_any (aiApiEndpoints) or Uri has_any (aiApiEndpoints)
| extend
    APIEndpoint = case(
        Uri has "/chat/completions", "💬 聊天补全",
        Uri has "/completions", "📝  文本补全",
        Uri has "/embeddings", "🔢 嵌入向量",
        Uri has "/models", "🤖 模型",
        Host has "openai.azure.com", "☁️ Azure OpenAI",
        Host has "api.openai.com", "🌐 OpenAI API",
        Host has "cognitive.microsoft.com", "🧠 认知服务",
        "⚙️ 其他AI API"
    ),
    HourlyBucket = bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| summarize
    RequestCount = count(),
    SuccessCount = countif(StatusCode > 0 and StatusCode < 300),
    ClientErrorCount = countif(StatusCode >= 400 and StatusCode < 500),
    ServerErrorCount = countif(StatusCode >= 500),
    AuthErrorCount = countif(StatusCode == 401 or StatusCode == 403),
    RateLimitCount = countif(StatusCode == 429),
    AvgResponseTime = round(avg(RespTimeMs), 0),
    P50ResponseTime = round(percentile(RespTimeMs, 50), 0),
    P95ResponseTime = round(percentile(RespTimeMs, 95), 0),
    P99ResponseTime = round(percentile(RespTimeMs, 99), 0),
    MaxResponseTime = round(max(RespTimeMs), 0),
    UniqueClients = dcount(ClientIp),
    TotalBandwidth = round(sum(Bytes) / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2)
  by APIEndpoint, HourlyBucket
| extend
    SuccessRate = round(todouble(SuccessCount) / todouble(RequestCount) * 100, 2),
    ErrorRate = round(todouble(ClientErrorCount + ServerErrorCount) / todouble(RequestCount) * 100, 2),
    PerformanceScore = case(
        AvgResponseTime <= 1000 and SuccessRate >= 99, 95,
        AvgResponseTime <= 3000 and SuccessRate >= 95, 85,
        AvgResponseTime <= 10000 and SuccessRate >= 90, 75,
        AvgResponseTime <= 30000 and SuccessRate >= 80, 65,
        50
    )
| extend
    HealthStatus = case(
        PerformanceScore >= 90, "🟢 健康",
        PerformanceScore >= 75, "🟡 需关注",
        PerformanceScore >= 60, "🟠 警告",
        "🔴 严重"
    ),
    Availability = case(
        SuccessRate >= 99.9, "🟢 优秀(99.9%+)",
        SuccessRate >= 99.5, "🟡 良好(99.5%+)",
        SuccessRate >= 99.0, "🟠 一般(99.0%+)",
        "🔴 较差(<99%)"
    )
| project
    ['API 终结点'] = APIEndpoint,
    ['时间窗口'] = format_datetime(HourlyBucket, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['健康状态'] = HealthStatus,
    ['可用性'] = Availability,
    ['性能评分'] = PerformanceScore,
    ['总计请求数'] = RequestCount,
    ['成功率 %'] = SuccessRate,
    ['错误率 %'] = ErrorRate,
    ['认证错误数'] = AuthErrorCount,
    ['率限制命中数'] = RateLimitCount,
    ['平均响应时间'] = AvgResponseTime,
    ['P95 响应时间'] = P95ResponseTime,
    ['P99 响应时间'] = P99ResponseTime,
    ['最大响应时间'] = MaxResponseTime,
    ['唯一客户端'] = UniqueClients,
    ['带宽(MB)'] = TotalBandwidth
| order by ['时间窗口'] desc, ['总计请求数'] desc
| take 50

content.json:
🎯 深度用户行为分析

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：该视图分析AI应用使用中的用户行为模式。通过机器学习突出显示异常会话、标记高风险用户和可视化访问趋势，帮助安全团队建立行为基线、检测内部威胁和强化账户防护。

💡 行为洞察

描绘典型用户在AI应用中的使用轨迹，建立行为基线

🔍 异常检测

利用机器学习发现异常访问模式与可疑用户行为

---

content.query:
// User AI application access behavior analysis (Entra SigninLogs only)
let allAIApps = dynamic([
    "chat", "copilot", "ai", "gpt", "claude", "bard", "gemini",
    "chatgpt", "openai", "anthropic", "perplexity", "character.ai",
    "microsoft copilot", "github copilot", "azure openai", "bing chat enterprise",
    "google bard", "amazon codewhisperer", "tabnine", "codeium",
    "chatbot", "conversational ai", "llm", "language model"
]);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName) and isnotempty(AppDisplayName)
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName)
| where AppNameLower has_any (allAIApps)
| extend
    SessionHour = datetime_part("hour", TimeGenerated),
    SessionDayOfWeek = dayofweek(TimeGenerated),
    DeviceOS = tostring(parse_json(tostring(DeviceDetail)).operatingSystem),
    Department = case(UserPrincipalName has '@', split(UserPrincipalName, '@')[1], "未知")
| extend
    IsWeekend = (SessionDayOfWeek == 0 or SessionDayOfWeek == 6),
    IsAfterHours = (SessionHour < 8 or SessionHour > 18),
    DeviceCategory = case(
        DeviceOS has "Windows" or DeviceOS startswith "Win", "Windows",
        DeviceOS has "macOS" or DeviceOS has "Mac", "macOS",
        DeviceOS has "iOS" or DeviceOS has "iPhone" or DeviceOS has "iPad", "iOS",
        DeviceOS has "Android", "Android",
        DeviceOS has "Linux" or DeviceOS has "Ubuntu", "Linux",
        isnotempty(DeviceOS), DeviceOS,
        "未知"
    )
| summarize
    TotalSessions = count(),
    UniqueApps = dcount(AppDisplayName),
    WeekendSessions = countif(IsWeekend),
    AfterHoursSessions = countif(IsAfterHours),
    UniqueDevices = dcount(DeviceCategory),
    UniqueLocations = dcount(Location),
    FirstAccess = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAccess = max(TimeGenerated),
    TopApps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 3)
  by UserPrincipalName, Department
| extend
    BehaviorScore = case(
        AfterHoursSessions > TotalSessions * 0.5, 3,
        WeekendSessions > TotalSessions * 0.3, 2,
        UniqueLocations > 5, 2,
        1
    )
| extend
    RiskProfile = case(
        BehaviorScore >= 3, "🔴 高风险用户",
        BehaviorScore >= 2, "🟠 中等风险",
        "🟢 典型用户"
    ),
    UsagePattern = case(
        TotalSessions >= 100, "🔥 重度用户",
        TotalSessions >= 50, "🔴 活跃用户",
        TotalSessions >= 20, "🟡 普通用户",
        "🟢 轻度用户"
    )
| project
    ['用户'] = UserPrincipalName,
    ['部门'] = Department,
    ['职位'] = "未知",
    ['使用模式'] = UsagePattern,
    ['风险级别'] = RiskProfile,
    ['总计会话数'] = TotalSessions,
    ['应用数量'] = UniqueApps,
    ['周末会话数'] = WeekendSessions,
    ['非工作时段会话数'] = AfterHoursSessions,
    ['设备数量'] = UniqueDevices,
    ['位置数量'] = UniqueLocations,
    ['首次访问'] = format_datetime(FirstAccess, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后访问'] = format_datetime(LastAccess, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['重点应用数'] = tostring(TopApps)
| order by ['总计会话数'] desc
| take 50

content.query:
// AI application browser and operating system distribution analysis (revised)
let allAIApps = dynamic(["chat", "copilot", "ai", "gpt", "claude", "bard"]);

SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName) and isnotempty(AppDisplayName)
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName)
| where AppNameLower has_any (allAIApps)
| extend 
    DeviceOS = tostring(parse_json(tostring(DeviceDetail)).operatingSystem),
    Browser = tostring(parse_json(tostring(DeviceDetail)).browser)
| extend
    // Unified device categorization - Windows as one category
    DeviceCategory = case(
        // Unified Windows category (all versions) - comprehensive matching to catch Windows 10, Windows 11, etc.
        DeviceOS has "Windows" or DeviceOS has "windows" or DeviceOS has "WINDOWS" or
        DeviceOS has "Win32" or DeviceOS has "win32" or DeviceOS has "Win64" or DeviceOS has "win64" or
        DeviceOS has "Win10" or DeviceOS has "Win 10" or DeviceOS has "Win11" or DeviceOS has "Win 11" or
        DeviceOS has "Win7" or DeviceOS has "Win 7" or DeviceOS has "Win8" or DeviceOS has "Win 8" or
        DeviceOS has "NT" or DeviceOS has "Microsoft Windows" or
        DeviceOS startswith "Win" or DeviceOS startswith "win", "💻 Windows",
        // macOS categorization
        DeviceOS has "macOS" or DeviceOS has "Mac OS" or DeviceOS has "OSX" or DeviceOS has "OS X" or DeviceOS has "Darwin", "🍎 macOS",
        // Mobile devices
        DeviceOS has "iOS" or DeviceOS has "iPhone" or DeviceOS has "iPad", "📱 iOS",
        DeviceOS has "Android", "🤖 Android",
        // Linux variants
        DeviceOS has "Linux" or DeviceOS has "Ubuntu" or DeviceOS has "CentOS" or DeviceOS has "RedHat" or DeviceOS has "Debian" or DeviceOS has "SUSE", "🐧 Linux",
        DeviceOS has "Chrome OS" or DeviceOS has "ChromeOS", "🌐 Chrome OS",
        isnotempty(DeviceOS), strcat("❓ ", DeviceOS),
        "❓ 未知设备"
    ),
    // Optimized browser categorization
    BrowserCategory = case(
        Browser has "Chrome" and not (Browser has "Edge"), "🌐 Chrome",
        Browser has "Firefox", "🦊 Firefox",
        Browser has "Safari" and not (Browser has "Chrome"), "🧭 Safari",
        Browser has "Edge" or Browser has "Microsoft Edge", "🌊 Edge",
        Browser has "Opera", "🎭 Opera",
        Browser has "Internet Explorer" or Browser has "IE", "⚠️ IE",
        isnotempty(Browser), strcat("❓ ", Browser),
        "❓ 未知浏览器"
    ),
    // Enhanced browser version assessment
    BrowserVersion = case(
        Browser has "Chrome", extract(@"Chrome\s?([0-9.]+)", 1, Browser),
        Browser has "Firefox", extract(@"Firefox\s?([0-9.]+)", 1, Browser),
        Browser has "Safari", extract(@"Safari\s?([0-9.]+)", 1, Browser),
        Browser has "Edge" or Browser has "Microsoft Edge", extract(@"(?:Edge|Microsoft Edge)\s?([0-9.]+)", 1, Browser),
        Browser has "Opera", extract(@"Opera\s?([0-9.]+)", 1, Browser),
        "未知版本"
    )
| summarize 
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    TotalSessions = count(),
    LastActivity = max(TimeGenerated),
    TopApps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 3)
  by DeviceCategory, BrowserCategory, BrowserVersion
| extend 
    UsageLevel = case(
        TotalSessions >= 100, "🔥 高使用量",
        TotalSessions >= 50, "🟠 中等使用量",
        TotalSessions >= 10, "🟡 低使用量",
        "🟢 偶尔使用"
    )
| extend
    SecurityRisk = case(
        BrowserVersion == "未知版本", "⚪ 版本未知",
        // Browser version risk assessment
        BrowserCategory == "🌐 Chrome" and toint(split(BrowserVersion, ".")[0]) < 100, "🔴 Chrome版本过旧",
        BrowserCategory == "🦊 Firefox" and toint(split(BrowserVersion, ".")[0]) < 90, "🔴 Firefox版本过旧",
        BrowserCategory == "🧭 Safari" and toint(split(BrowserVersion, ".")[0]) < 15, "🔴 Safari版本过旧",
        BrowserCategory == "🌊 Edge" and toint(split(BrowserVersion, ".")[0]) < 100, "🔴 Edge版本过旧",
        BrowserCategory == "⚠️ IE", "🔥 Internet Explorer 高风险",
        "🟢 版本相对安全"
    )
| project 
    ['设备类型'] = DeviceCategory,
    ['浏览器类型'] = BrowserCategory,
    ['浏览器版本'] = BrowserVersion,
    ['用户数'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['会话数'] = TotalSessions,
    ['使用频率'] = UsageLevel,
    ['安全风险'] = SecurityRisk,
    ['最后活动'] = format_datetime(LastActivity, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['重点应用数'] = tostring(TopApps)
| order by ['会话数'] desc
| take 50

// Anomalous behavior detection analysis (final revision)
let allAIApps = dynamic(["chat", "copilot", "ai", "gpt", "claude", "bard"]);

SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName) and isnotempty(AppDisplayName)
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName)
| where AppNameLower has_any (allAIApps)
| extend 
    Hour = datetime_part("hour", TimeGenerated),
    DayOfWeek = dayofweek(TimeGenerated)
| extend
    IsWeekend = (DayOfWeek == 0 or DayOfWeek == 6),
    IsNightTime = (Hour >= 22 or Hour <= 5),
    IsEarlyMorning = (Hour >= 6 and Hour <= 8),
    IsBusinessHours = (Hour >= 9 and Hour <= 17 and not(DayOfWeek == 0 or DayOfWeek == 6))
| summarize 
    TotalLogins = count(),
    WeekendLogins = countif(IsWeekend),
    NightLogins = countif(IsNightTime),
    EarlyMorningLogins = countif(IsEarlyMorning),
    BusinessHoursLogins = countif(IsBusinessHours),
    UniqueApps = dcount(AppDisplayName),
    UniqueLocations = dcount(Location),
    FirstLogin = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastLogin = max(TimeGenerated),
    LoginDays = dcount(bin(TimeGenerated, 1d))
  by UserPrincipalName
| project 
    UserPrincipalName,
    TotalLogins,
    WeekendLogins,
    NightLogins,
    EarlyMorningLogins,
    BusinessHoursLogins,
    UniqueApps,
    UniqueLocations,
    FirstLogin,
    LastLogin,
    LoginDays,
    WeekendRatio = round(todouble(WeekendLogins) / todouble(TotalLogins) * 100, 1),
    NightRatio = round(todouble(NightLogins) / todouble(TotalLogins) * 100, 1),
    BusinessHoursRatio = round(todouble(BusinessHoursLogins) / todouble(TotalLogins) * 100, 1)
| extend
    AnomalyScore = case(
        WeekendRatio > 50, 3,
        NightRatio > 30, 3,
        UniqueLocations > 10, 2,
        WeekendRatio > 30 or NightRatio > 20, 2,
        UniqueLocations > 5, 1,
        0
    )
| extend
    BehaviorType = case(
        AnomalyScore >= 3, "🔴 严重异常",
        AnomalyScore >= 2, "🟠 中度异常",
        AnomalyScore >= 1, "🟡 轻微异常",
        "🟢 正常行为"
    )
| where AnomalyScore > 0  // Display only users with anomalies
| project 
    ['用户'] = UserPrincipalName,
    ['行为类型'] = BehaviorType,
    ['异常评分'] = AnomalyScore,
    ['总计登录'] = TotalLogins,
    ['周末登录占比'] = strcat(tostring(WeekendRatio), "%"),
    ['夜间登录占比'] = strcat(tostring(NightRatio), "%"),
    ['业务时段占比'] = strcat(tostring(BusinessHoursRatio), "%"),
    ['位置数量'] = UniqueLocations,
    ['已使用应用数'] = UniqueApps,
    ['活跃天'] = LoginDays,
    ['首次登录'] = format_datetime(FirstLogin, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后登录'] = format_datetime(LastLogin, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['异常评分'] desc, ['总计登录'] desc
| take 30

SigninLogs

content.title: 🌍 地理访问模式分析

content.query:
//  Advanced Anomalous Behavior Detection - Insider Risk & XDR
// Multi-source behavioral anomaly detection for AI applications
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
let baselineWindow = 30d;
// Calculate baseline behavior
let userBaseline = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated between ((t0 - baselineWindow) .. t0)
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName)
| where AppNameLower has_any ("ai", "copilot", "chat", "gpt", "openai", "azure", "microsoft")
| summarize
    AvgDailySignins = todouble(count()) / 30.0,
    UniqueLocations = todouble(dcount(Location)),
    UniqueIPs = todouble(dcount(IPAddress)),
    UniqueApps = todouble(dcount(AppDisplayName))
  by UserPrincipalName;
// Detect anomalies in current period
let currentBehavior = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName)
| where AppNameLower has_any ("ai", "copilot", "chat", "gpt", "openai", "azure", "microsoft")
| summarize
    CurrentSignins = todouble(count()),
    CurrentLocations = todouble(dcount(Location)),
    CurrentIPs = todouble(dcount(IPAddress)),
    CurrentApps = todouble(dcount(AppDisplayName)),
    LocationList = make_set(Location, 3),
    IPList = make_set(IPAddress, 3),
    LastActivity = max(TimeGenerated)
  by UserPrincipalName;
// Join and analyze
currentBehavior
| join kind=leftouter (userBaseline) on UserPrincipalName
| extend
    BaselineSignins = coalesce(AvgDailySignins, 1.0),
    BaselineLocations = coalesce(UniqueLocations, 1.0),
    BaselineIPs = coalesce(UniqueIPs, 1.0)
| extend
    SigninAnomaly = (CurrentSignins > (BaselineSignins * 2.0)),
    LocationAnomaly = (CurrentLocations > (BaselineLocations + 1.0)),
    IPAnomaly = (CurrentIPs > (BaselineIPs + 1.0)),
    NewUser = isempty(AvgDailySignins)
| extend
    AnomalyScore = 
        toint(SigninAnomaly) * 3 +
        toint(LocationAnomaly) * 2 +
        toint(IPAnomaly) * 2 +
        toint(NewUser) * 1
| extend
    AnomalyType = case(
        SigninAnomaly and LocationAnomaly, "🔴 过度访问+位置异常",
        SigninAnomaly, "🟠 过度AI访问",
        LocationAnomaly, "🟡 异常位置访问",
        IPAnomaly, "🟠 IP地址异常",
        NewUser, "🟢 新AI用户",
        "⚪ 正常行为"
    ),
    ThreatLevel = case(
        AnomalyScore >= 5, "🔥 严重异常",
        AnomalyScore >= 3, "🔴 高度异常",
        AnomalyScore >= 2, "🟠 中度异常",
        "🟡 低异常"
    )
| project
    ['用户'] = UserPrincipalName,
    ['威胁级别'] = ThreatLevel,
    ['异常类型'] = AnomalyType,
    ['异常评分'] = AnomalyScore,
    ['当前活动数量'] = toint(CurrentSignins),
    ['每日平均基线'] = round(BaselineSignins, 1),
    ['位置数/设备数'] = strcat_array(LocationList, ", "),
    ['IP 地址'] = strcat_array(IPList, ", "),
    ['最后活动'] = format_datetime(LastActivity, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['异常评分'] desc, ['当前活动数量'] desc
| take 50
