content.json:
⏱️ AI安全时间关联分析

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：该视图探索AI使用与安全事件在时间维度上的关联。通过关联工作负载与告警，安全团队可定位攻击窗口、预测威胁突发并理解行为触发因素，从而优化监控排期。

🔗 时序关联

分析AI活动与安全事件之间的时序关联

📈 趋势预测

利用历史模式与机器学习预判即将到来的威胁活动

---

content.query:
// AI usage and security event time correlation analysis (revised)
let timeWindow = 1h; // Time window: analyze correlations within one hour

// Retrieve AI usage activity
let aiUsage = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where AppDisplayName has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "chat", "gpt")
| extend UsageHour = bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| summarize 
    UsageCount = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    UsageUsers = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 10)
  by UsageHour
| extend EventType = "💼 AI使用活动";

// Retrieve security alerts
let securityEvents = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where AlertName has_any ("Jailbreak", "Prompt", "AI", "模型")
| extend ThreatHour = bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| summarize 
    ThreatCount = count(),
    HighSeverityCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "高"),
    ThreatResources = make_set(CompromisedEntity, 5)
  by ThreatHour
| extend EventType = "🚨 安全威胁";

// Merge analysis
aiUsage
| join kind=fullouter (securityEvents) on $left.UsageHour == $right.ThreatHour
| extend 
    TimeHour = coalesce(UsageHour, ThreatHour),
    UsageCount = coalesce(UsageCount, 0),
    ThreatCount = coalesce(ThreatCount, 0),
    UniqueUsers = coalesce(UniqueUsers, 0),
    HighSeverityCount = coalesce(HighSeverityCount, 0)
| extend 
    CorrelationRisk = case(
        ThreatCount > 0 and UsageCount > 0, "🔴 高风险窗口",
        ThreatCount > 0, "🟠 威胁活跃",
        UsageCount > 0, "🟢 正常使用",
        "⚪ 无活动"
    )
| project 
    ['时间窗口'] = format_datetime(TimeHour, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['关联风险'] = CorrelationRisk,
    ['AI 使用数量'] = UsageCount,
    ['安全威胁数量'] = ThreatCount,
    ['高-严重度威胁'] = HighSeverityCount,
    ['活跃用户数'] = UniqueUsers
| order by ['时间窗口'] desc
| take 50

content.json:
### 高级关联分析
---

content.query:
// User behavior and threat correlation analysis (revised)
// Analyze AI usage patterns for users alongside concurrent security incidents
let suspiciousUsers = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where AppDisplayName has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "chat", "gpt")
| extend Hour = datetime_part("hour", TimeGenerated)
| extend IsAfterHours = (Hour < 8 or Hour > 18)
| summarize 
    TotalLogins = count(),
    AfterHoursLogins = countif(IsAfterHours),
    UniqueApps = dcount(AppDisplayName),
    LoginDays = dcount(bin(TimeGenerated, 1d))
  by UserPrincipalName
| extend 
    AfterHoursRatio = round(todouble(AfterHoursLogins) / todouble(TotalLogins) * 100, 1),
    SuspicionScore = case(
        AfterHoursLogins > TotalLogins * 0.5, 3,
        AfterHoursLogins > TotalLogins * 0.3, 2,
        1
    )
| where SuspicionScore >= 2;

// Retrieve threat incidents covering the same days
let threatPeriods = SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where Title has_any ("Jailbreak", "Prompt", "AI", "模型")
| extend ThreatDay = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| summarize 
    DailyThreats = count(),
    ThreatDetails = make_set(Title, 3)
  by ThreatDay;

// Correlate usage with threat activity
suspiciousUsers
| join kind=leftouter (
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
    | where AppDisplayName has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "chat", "gpt")
    | extend LoginDay = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
    | summarize by UserPrincipalName, LoginDay
) on UserPrincipalName
| join kind=leftouter (threatPeriods) on $left.LoginDay == $right.ThreatDay
| summarize 
    UserLogins = max(TotalLogins),
    UserAfterHoursRatio = max(AfterHoursRatio),
    UserSuspicionScore = max(SuspicionScore),
    ThreatDays = countif(isnotempty(DailyThreats)),
    TotalThreats = sum(DailyThreats)
  by UserPrincipalName
| extend 
    RiskLevel = case(
        TotalThreats > 0 and UserSuspicionScore >= 3, "🔥 严重风险",
        TotalThreats > 0 and UserSuspicionScore >= 2, "🔴 高风险",
        UserSuspicionScore >= 3, "🟠 行为异常",
        "🟢 正常用户"
    )
| project 
    ['用户'] = UserPrincipalName,
    ['风险级别'] = RiskLevel,
    ['可疑评分'] = UserSuspicionScore,
    ['总计登录'] = UserLogins,
    ['非工作时段占比'] = strcat(UserAfterHoursRatio, "%"),
    ['威胁关联天数'] = ThreatDays,
    ['关联威胁数量'] = coalesce(TotalThreats, 0)
| order by ['可疑评分'] desc, ['关联威胁数量'] desc
| take 20

// Detailed timeline of threat events
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where AlertName has_any ("Jailbreak", "Prompt", "AI", "模型")
| extend 
    ThreatType = case(
        AlertName has "Jailbreak", "🚨 越狱攻击",
        AlertName has "Prompt", "💉 提示词注入",
        AlertName has "模型", "🤖 模型威胁",
        "⚠️ 其他威胁"
    ),
    ResourceName = CompromisedEntity,
    Hour = datetime_part("hour", TimeGenerated)
| project 
    ['时间'] = format_datetime(TimeGenerated, 'MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    ['威胁类型'] = ThreatType,
    ['严重度'] = AlertSeverity,
    ['目标资源'] = ResourceName,
    ['时间周期'] = case(
        Hour >= 0 and Hour < 6, "🌙 深夜(0-6)",
        Hour >= 6 and Hour < 12, "🌅 上午(6-12)",
        Hour >= 12 and Hour < 18, "🌤️ 下午(12-18)",
        Hour >= 18 and Hour < 24, "🌆 晚间(18-24)",
        "⚪ 未知时段"
    ),
    ['告警名称'] = AlertName
| order by ['时间'] desc
| take 30

// AI application usage heatmap: hour versus application family
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > {TimeRange:start}
| where AppDisplayName has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "chat", "gpt")
| extend 
    Hour = datetime_part("hour", TimeGenerated),
    AppCategory = case(
        AppDisplayName has "Security Copilot", "Security_Copilot",
        AppDisplayName has "AI Studio", "AI_Studio", 
        AppDisplayName has "GitHub Copilot", "GitHub_Copilot",
        AppDisplayName has "365 Copilot" or AppDisplayName has "M365 Copilot", "M365_Copilot",
        "Other_AI_Apps"
    )
| summarize UsageCount = count() by Hour = toint(Hour), AppCategory
| summarize 
    Security_Copilot = sumif(UsageCount, AppCategory == "Security_Copilot"),
    AI_Studio = sumif(UsageCount, AppCategory == "AI_Studio"),
    GitHub_Copilot = sumif(UsageCount, AppCategory == "GitHub_Copilot"),
    M365_Copilot = sumif(UsageCount, AppCategory == "M365_Copilot"),
    Other_AI_Apps = sumif(UsageCount, AppCategory == "Other_AI_Apps")
  by Hour
| project 
    Hour,
    ['安全 Copilot'] = Security_Copilot,
    ['AI 工作室'] = AI_Studio,
    ['GitHub Copilot'] = GitHub_Copilot,
    ['M365 Copilot'] = M365_Copilot,
    ['其他 AI 应用'] = Other_AI_Apps
| order by Hour asc

content.title: 📊 AI 安全风险关联汇总

content.json:
🛡️ MITRE ATT&CK AI威胁映射

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：该视图将AI相关安全威胁映射到MITRE ATT&CK框架。通过应用标准化威胁分类和技术映射，帮助安全团队了解AI攻击链路、发现防御缺口，并设计符合行业标准的检测与响应策略。

🎯 战术映射

将AI威胁与MITRE ATT&CK战术和技术对齐，实现一致性报告

🔍 差距分析

识别AI防御面上的覆盖度缺口与薄弱控制项

---

content.query:
// MITRE ATT&CK AI threat mapping (balanced color version)
let aiKeywords = dynamic(["AI", "模型", "Prompt", "Copilot", "LLM", "GPT", "Jailbreak", "注入"]);

// 1. Try to use native Sentinel MITRE data first
let nativeMitreAlerts = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where AlertName has_any (aiKeywords)
| where isnotempty(Tactics) or isnotempty(Techniques)
| extend 
    NativeTactics = tostring(Tactics),
    NativeTechniques = tostring(Techniques),
    DataSource = "Sentinel原生"
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, 
          MITRETactic = NativeTactics, MITRETechnique = NativeTechniques, DataSource;

// 2. AI-enhanced mapping
let enhancedMitreAlerts = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where AlertName has_any (aiKeywords)
| where isempty(Tactics) and isempty(Techniques)
| extend 
    MITRETactic = case(
        AlertName has_any ("提示词注入", "社会工程", "供应链"), "TA0001-初始访问",
        AlertName has_any ("代码注入", "Jailbreak", "模型劫持"), "TA0002-执行",
        AlertName has_any ("后门", "模型投毒", "训练数据篡改"), "TA0003-持久化",
        AlertName has_any ("权限提升", "授权绕过"), "TA0004-权限提升",
        AlertName has_any ("防御逃逸", "模型逃逸", "对抗攻击"), "TA0005-防御逃逸",
        AlertName has_any ("Credential", "令牌", "API密钥"), "TA0006-凭据访问",
        AlertName has_any ("Discovery", "侦察", "模型架构"), "TA0007-发现",
        AlertName has_any ("横向移动", "模型链接攻击"), "TA0008-横向移动",
        AlertName has_any ("数据收集", "模型提取", "训练数据窃取"), "TA0009-收集",
        AlertName has_any ("数据外泄", "数据窃取", "模型窃取"), "TA0010-数据外泄",
        AlertName has_any ("影响", "模型破坏", "服务中断"), "TA0011-影响",
        "未知"
    ),
    MITRETechnique = case(
        AlertName has_any ("提示词注入", "社会工程"), "T1566-钓鱼",
        AlertName has_any ("代码注入", "Jailbreak"), "T1059-命令和脚本解释器",
        AlertName has_any ("模型投毒", "后门"), "T1546-事件触发执行",
        AlertName has_any ("防御逃逸", "模型逃逸"), "T1562-削弱防御",
        AlertName has_any ("权限提升"), "T1078-有效账户",
        AlertName has_any ("Credential", "令牌"), "T1555-密码存储凭据",
        AlertName has_any ("Discovery", "侦察"), "T1083-文件和目录发现",
        AlertName has_any ("横向移动"), "T1021-远程服务",
        AlertName has_any ("数据收集", "模型提取"), "T1005-本地系统数据",
        AlertName has_any ("数据外泄", "数据窃取"), "T1041-C2通道数据外泄",
        AlertName has_any ("模型破坏", "影响"), "T1485-数据销毁",
        AlertName has_any ("对抗攻击"), "T1XXX-对抗性ML攻击",
        "未知"
    ),
    DataSource = "AI增强映射"
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, MITRETactic, MITRETechnique, DataSource;

// 3. Combine and classify
let allMitreData = nativeMitreAlerts
| union enhancedMitreAlerts
| extend 
    AIThreatCategory = case(
        AlertName has_any ("提示词注入", "Jailbreak"), "💉 AI提示词攻击",
        AlertName has_any ("模型投毒", "后门"), "☠️ AI模型投毒",
        AlertName has_any ("对抗攻击", "防御逃逸"), "⚔️ 对抗攻击",
        AlertName has_any ("数据外泄", "数据窃取"), "📤 AI数据外泄",
        AlertName has_any ("Privilege", "授权"), "👑 AI权限滥用",
        AlertName has_any ("Discovery", "侦察"), "🔍 AI侦察",
        AlertName has_any ("横向移动", "链接攻击"), "🔗 AI横向移动",
        AlertName has_any ("Credential", "令牌"), "🔑 AI凭据窃取",
        AlertName has_any ("影响", "破坏"), "💥 AI破坏性攻击",
        "⚠️ 其他AI威胁"
    );

// 4. Produce the final metrics
allMitreData
| where MITRETactic != "未知"
| summarize 
    AlertCount = count(),
    HighSeverityCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "高"),
    MediumSeverityCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "中"),
    LowSeverityCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "低"),
    LastAlert = max(TimeGenerated),
    DataSources = make_set(DataSource),
    SampleAlerts = make_set(AlertName, 3)
  by MITRETactic, MITRETechnique, AIThreatCategory
| extend 
    // Calculate risk score
    CalculatedRiskScore = HighSeverityCount * 5 + MediumSeverityCount * 2 + LowSeverityCount * 1
| extend
    // Risk level: higher score = hotter color
    RiskLevel = case(
        CalculatedRiskScore >= 50, "🔥 极端风险",
        CalculatedRiskScore >= 20, "🔴 高风险",
        CalculatedRiskScore >= 10, "🟠 中等风险",
        CalculatedRiskScore >= 1, "🟡 低风险",
        "⚪ 无风险"
    ),
    ThreatDensity = round(todouble(AlertCount) / 30.0, 2)
| project 
    ['MITRE 战术'] = MITRETactic,
    ['MITRE 技术'] = MITRETechnique,
    ['AI 威胁类别'] = AIThreatCategory,
    ['风险级别'] = RiskLevel,
    ['风险评分'] = CalculatedRiskScore,
    ['总计告警'] = AlertCount,
    ['高-严重度告警'] = HighSeverityCount,
    ['中严重度告警'] = MediumSeverityCount,
    ['低严重度告警'] = LowSeverityCount,
    ['威胁密度/天'] = ThreatDensity,
    ['数据来源'] = tostring(DataSources),
    ['样本告警'] = tostring(SampleAlerts),
    ['最近告警'] = format_datetime(LastAlert, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['风险评分'] desc, ['高-严重度告警'] desc, ['总计告警'] desc
| take 25

//  Advanced Prompt Injection & Jailbreak Detection
// Maps AI-specific attacks to MITRE ATT&CK and OWASP Top 10 for LLM
// Uses Azure AI Content Safety, Prompt Shield, and Defender for AI detections
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
union isfuzzy=true
    (
    // Azure Prompt Shield & Content Safety detections
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where OperationName has_any ("PromptShield", "ContentSafety")
    | extend
        DetectionSource = "Azure Prompt Shield",
        AttackVector = case(
            TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[0].newValue has "DirectAttack", "直接提示词注入",
            TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[0].newValue has "IndirectAttack", "间接提示词注入",
            OperationName has "PromptShield", "提示词防护检测",
            "内容安全违规"
        ),
        MITRETechnique = "LLM01 - 提示词注入",
        MITRETactic = "TA0001 - 初始访问",
        Severity = case(
            TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[0].newValue has "高", "严重",
            TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[0].newValue has "中", "高",
            "中"
        ),
        UserPrincipal = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
        UserIP = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress),
        Details = tostring(TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[0].newValue)
    | project TimeGenerated, DetectionSource, AttackVector, MITRETechnique, MITRETactic, Severity, UserPrincipal, UserIP, Details
    ),
    (
    // Defender for AI security alerts - Jailbreak and Prompt Injection
    SecurityAlert
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where AlertName has_any ("提示词注入", "Jailbreak", "AI", "模型")
    | extend
        DetectionSource = "Defender for AI",
        AttackVector = case(
            AlertName has "提示词注入", "提示词注入攻击",
            AlertName has "Jailbreak", "越狱攻击(DAN)",
            AlertName has "模型滥用", "模型滥用攻击",
            AlertName has "数据投毒", "数据投毒攻击",
            "AI安全告警"
        ),
        MITRETechnique = case(
            AlertName has "提示词注入", "LLM01 - 提示词注入",
            AlertName has "Jailbreak", "LLM01 - 提示词注入(越狱)",
            AlertName has "模型", "LLM02 - 不安全输出处理",
            AlertName has "数据", "LLM03 - 训练数据投毒",
            "LLM01 - 提示词注入"
        ),
        MITRETactic = case(
            AlertName has_any ("Jailbreak", "绕过"), "TA0005 - 防御逃逸",
            AlertName has "数据", "TA0003 - 持久化",
            "TA0001 - 初始访问"
        ),
        Severity = case(
            AlertSeverity == "高", "严重",
            AlertSeverity == "中", "高",
            "中"
        ),
        UserPrincipal = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).UserPrincipalName),
        UserIP = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).ClientIP),
        Details = AlertName
    | project TimeGenerated, DetectionSource, AttackVector, MITRETechnique, MITRETactic, Severity, UserPrincipal, UserIP, Details
    )
| summarize
    AttackCount = count(),
    CriticalCount = countif(Severity == "严重"),
    HighCount = countif(Severity == "高"),
    MediumCount = countif(Severity == "中"),
    UniqueAttackers = dcount(UserPrincipal),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(UserIP),
    AttackerList = make_set(UserPrincipal, 5),
    IPList = make_set(UserIP, 5),
    SampleDetails = make_set(Details, 2),
    FirstDetected = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastDetected = max(TimeGenerated)
  by DetectionSource, AttackVector, MITRETechnique, MITRETactic
| extend
    RiskScore = (CriticalCount * 5) + (HighCount * 3) + (MediumCount * 2),
    AttackFrequency = round(todouble(AttackCount) / todouble(datetime_diff('hour', LastDetected, FirstDetected) + 1), 1)
| extend ThreatLevel = case(
    RiskScore >= 50, " 严重威胁",
    RiskScore >= 20, " 高威胁",
    RiskScore >= 10, " 中威胁",
    RiskScore >= 1, " 低威胁",
    "? 最小"
)
| project
    ['威胁级别'] = ThreatLevel,
    ['攻击向量'] = AttackVector,
    ['MITRE 技术'] = MITRETechnique,
    ['MITRE 战术'] = MITRETactic,
    ['检测来源'] = DetectionSource,
    ['风险评分'] = RiskScore,
    ['总计攻击'] = AttackCount,
    ['严重'] = CriticalCount,
    ['高'] = HighCount,
    ['中'] = MediumCount,
    ['攻击/小时'] = AttackFrequency,
    ['唯一攻击者'] = UniqueAttackers,
    ['唯一 IP数'] = UniqueIPs,
    ['攻击者样本'] = tostring(AttackerList),
    ['IP 样本'] = tostring(IPList),
    ['攻击示例'] = tostring(SampleDetails),
    ['首次检测到'] = format_datetime(FirstDetected, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后检测到'] = format_datetime(LastDetected, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['风险评分'] desc, ['总计攻击'] desc

content.json:
🚨 AI威胁响应与缓解

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：该视图追踪AI相关安全事件的响应效率，并汇总标准化预案。用于评估团队就绪度、缩短遏制周期和执行一致的缓解操作。

⚡ 事件响应

概述可重复的AI事件处置流程与建议遏制步骤

监控平均处置时间、闭环率与响应人员工作负载趋势

---

content.title: 📊 AI 效率

content.query:
// AI security response recommendations (color-aligned version)
datatable(
    ThreatType:string,
    Severity:string,
    ResponseAction:string,
    Priority:string,
    EstimatedTime:string,
    ResponsibleTeam:string
)[
    "AI越狱尝试", "高", "立即修订AI安全策略、加强输入验证和强化输出过滤", "严重", "2 hours", "AI安全团队",
    "提示词注入", "高", "部署提示词过滤、刷新检测规则并扩展内容审核覆盖范围", "严重", "4 hours", "安全运营中心",
    "模型投毒", "高", "隔离受影响模型、回滚至可信版本并使用干净数据重新训练", "严重", "8 hours", "AI开发团队",
    "数据外泄", "高", "立即隔离受影响系统、评估暴露数据并通知相关方", "严重", "1 hour", "事件响应团队",
    "模型窃取", "中", "加强访问控制、应用模型加密并启用水印", "高", "12 hours", "AI安全团队",
    "权限滥用", "中", "重置受影响账户权限、审计访问日志并强制多因素认证", "中", "6 hours", "身份管理团队",
    "对抗攻击", "中", "部署对抗检测模型并提升模型鲁棒性", "中", "24 hours", "AI研究团队",
    "异常访问", "低", "加强监控、更新地理速度控制并分析访问模式", "低", "12 hours", "网络安全团队",
    "API滥用", "低", "强制API速率限制并监控异常调用模式", "低", "8 hours", "API管理团队",
    "配置错误", "低", "修正安全设置并运行基线配置检查", "低", "4 hours", "系统管理团队"
]
| extend 
    SeverityIcon = case(
        Severity == "高", "🔴",
        Severity == "中", "🟠",
        Severity == "低", "🟡",
        "⚪"
    ),
    PriorityIcon = case(
        Priority == "严重", "🔥",
        Priority == "高", "🔴",
        Priority == "中", "🟠",
        Priority == "低", "🟢",
        "⚪"
    ),
    PriorityOrder = case(
        Priority == "严重", 1,
        Priority == "高", 2,
        Priority == "中", 3,
        Priority == "低", 4,
        5
    ),
    ThreatIcon = case(
        ThreatType == "AI越狱尝试", "🚨",
        ThreatType == "提示词注入", "💉",
        ThreatType == "模型投毒", "☠️",
        ThreatType == "数据外泄", "📤",
        ThreatType == "模型窃取", "🔓",
        ThreatType == "权限滥用", "👑",
        ThreatType == "对抗攻击", "⚔️",
        ThreatType == "异常访问", "🔍",
        ThreatType == "API滥用", "🔌",
        ThreatType == "配置错误", "⚙️",
        "⚠️"
    )
| project 
    ['威胁类型'] = strcat(ThreatIcon, " ", ThreatType),
    ['严重度'] = strcat(SeverityIcon, " ", Severity),
    ['优先级'] = strcat(PriorityIcon, " ", Priority),
    ['响应动作'] = ResponseAction,
    ['预估时间'] = EstimatedTime,
    ['责任团队'] = ResponsibleTeam,
    PriorityOrder
| order by PriorityOrder asc
| project-away PriorityOrder

// AI incident response success trend (repaired version)
SecurityIncident
| where CreatedTime > ago(90d)
| where Title has_any ("AI", "模型", "Prompt", "Copilot", "Jailbreak")
| extend 
    IsResolved = (Status == "已关闭" or Status == "Resolved"),
    WeekStart = startofweek(CreatedTime)
| summarize 
    TotalIncidents = count(),
    ResolvedIncidents = countif(IsResolved),
    AvgResolutionTimeHours = round(avg(datetime_diff('hour', ClosedTime, CreatedTime)), 1)
  by WeekStart
| extend 
    SuccessRate = round(todouble(ResolvedIncidents) / todouble(TotalIncidents) * 100, 1)
| order by WeekStart asc
| project 
    WeekStart,
    ['处置率 %'] = SuccessRate,
    ['总计事件数'] = TotalIncidents,
    ['已处置事件数'] = ResolvedIncidents,
    ['平均处置时间(小时)'] = AvgResolutionTimeHours
| render timechart
content.title: 📈 AI 成功率趋势

content.query:
//  Defender for AI Automated Response & Security Incident Tracking
// Tracks AI security incidents and response actions from Defender for AI and Sentinel
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
union isfuzzy=true
    (
    // Security Alerts from Defender for AI
    SecurityAlert
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where AlertName has_any ("AI", "Prompt", "Jailbreak", "模型", "注入", "数据投毒")
    | extend
        ResponseAction = case(
            Status == "Resolved", "✅ 告警已解决",
            Status == "InProgress", "🔄 调查进行中",
            Status == "New", "🆕 新告警",
            "⚪ 其他状态"
        ),
        ThreatType = case(
            AlertName has "提示词注入", "提示词注入攻击",
            AlertName has "Jailbreak", "越狱攻击",
            AlertName has "模型", "模型滥用",
            AlertName has "数据投毒", "数据投毒",
            "AI安全威胁"
        ),
        Severity = case(
            AlertSeverity == "高", "严重",
            AlertSeverity == "中", "高",
            AlertSeverity == "低", "中",
            "低"
        ),
        AffectedEntity = tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0])
    | extend ExtendedProps = todynamic(ExtendedProperties)
    | extend
        UserAccount = tostring(ExtendedProps.UserPrincipalName),
        SourceIP = tostring(ExtendedProps.ClientIP)
    | project TimeGenerated, ResponseAction, ThreatType, Severity, AlertName, AffectedEntity, UserAccount, SourceIP, Status
    ),
    (
    // Security Incidents from Sentinel
    SecurityIncident
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where Title has_any ("AI", "Prompt", "Jailbreak", "模型", "Copilot")
    | extend
        ResponseAction = case(
            Status == "已关闭", "✅ 事件已关闭",
            Status == "活跃", "🔄 活跃调查",
            Status == "New", "🆕 新事件",
            "⚪ 其他状态"
        ),
        ThreatType = case(
            Title has "Prompt", "基于提示词的攻击",
            Title has "Jailbreak", "越狱尝试",
            Title has "模型", "AI模型威胁",
            Title has "数据", "数据安全威胁",
            "AI安全事件"
        ),
        Severity = case(
            Severity == "高", "严重",
            Severity == "中", "高",
            "中"
        ),
        AffectedEntity = tostring(RelatedEntities),
        UserAccount = Owner.assignedTo,
        SourceIP = ""
    | project TimeGenerated, ResponseAction, ThreatType, Severity, AlertName = Title, AffectedEntity, UserAccount, SourceIP, Status
    )
| summarize
    ActionCount = count(),
    CriticalActions = countif(Severity == "严重"),
    HighActions = countif(Severity == "高"),
    ResolvedCount = countif(ResponseAction has_any ("Resolved", "已关闭")),
    InProgressCount = countif(ResponseAction has_any ("Progress", "活跃")),
    NewCount = countif(ResponseAction has_any ("New")),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserAccount),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    SampleAlerts = make_set(AlertName, 3),
    FirstAction = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAction = max(TimeGenerated)
  by ResponseAction, ThreatType, Severity
| extend
    EffectivenessScore = case(
        ResolvedCount >= 10, 5,
        ResolvedCount >= 5, 4,
        InProgressCount >= 5, 3,
        ActionCount >= 10, 2,
        1
    ),
    ResolutionRate = case(
        ActionCount > 0, round(todouble(ResolvedCount) / todouble(ActionCount) * 100, 1),
        0.0
    )
| extend
    ResponseStatus = case(
        EffectivenessScore >= 4, "🟢 高度有效",
        EffectivenessScore >= 3, "🟡 有效",
        EffectivenessScore >= 2, "🟠 中等",
        "🔴 有限"
    )
| project
    ['响应动作'] = ResponseAction,
    ['威胁类型'] = ThreatType,
    ['响应状态'] = ResponseStatus,
    ['严重度'] = Severity,
    ['有效性评分'] = EffectivenessScore,
    ['处置率 %'] = ResolutionRate,
    ['总计动作'] = ActionCount,
    ['严重动作'] = CriticalActions,
    ['高-影响动作'] = HighActions,
    ['已处置'] = ResolvedCount,
    ['进行中'] = InProgressCount,
    ['新增'] = NewCount,
    ['用户数受影响'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['唯一 IP数'] = UniqueIPs,
    ['告警样本'] = tostring(SampleAlerts),
    ['首次动作'] = format_datetime(FirstAction, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后动作'] = format_datetime(LastAction, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['有效性评分'] desc, ['总计动作'] desc
content.title: 🛡️ Defender for AI 安全响应 & 事件追踪

content.query:
//  AI Access from Non-Compliant & Risky Devices
// Monitors AI application access from non-compliant or high-risk devices that should be isolated
// Uses Entra ID SigninLogs for real device compliance data
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where AppDisplayName has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "chat", "gpt", "Claude", "Bard")
| extend
    IsCompliant = tostring(DeviceDetail.isCompliant),
    IsManaged = tostring(DeviceDetail.isManaged),
    TrustType = tostring(DeviceDetail.trustType),
    DeviceId = tostring(DeviceDetail.deviceId),
    DisplayName = tostring(DeviceDetail.displayName),
    OS = tostring(DeviceDetail.operatingSystem)
| where IsCompliant == "false" or IsManaged == "false" or RiskLevelDuringSignIn != "none"
| extend
    RemediationAction = case(
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high" and IsCompliant == "false", "🔥 需隔离(高风险+不合规)",
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high", "🔴 高风险 - 密切监控",
        IsCompliant == "false" and IsManaged == "false", "🚫 封锁未受管不合规设备",
        IsCompliant == "false", "⚠️ 强制合规策略",
        IsManaged == "false", "📱 要求设备注册",
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "medium", "🟡 中等风险 - 需审查",
        "ℹ️ 审查设备状态"
    ),
    Platform = case(
        OS has "Windows", "Windows",
        OS has "iOS", "iOS",
        OS has "Android", "Android",
        OS has "Mac", "macOS",
        OS has "Linux", "Linux",
        "其他"
    ),
    ActionSeverity = case(
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high" and IsCompliant == "false", "严重",
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high" or (IsCompliant == "false" and IsManaged == "false"), "高",
        IsCompliant == "false" or RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "medium", "中",
        "低"
    ),
    RiskLevel = case(
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high", "高风险",
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "medium", "中风险",
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "low", "低风险",
        "无风险数据"
    )
| summarize
    ActionCount = count(),
    CriticalDevices = dcountif(DeviceId, ActionSeverity == "严重"),
    HighRiskDevices = dcountif(DeviceId, ActionSeverity == "高"),
    NonCompliantDevices = dcountif(DeviceId, IsCompliant == "false"),
    UnmanagedDevices = dcountif(DeviceId, IsManaged == "false"),
    UniqueDevices = dcount(DeviceId),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    UniqueApps = dcount(AppDisplayName),
    DeviceList = make_set(DisplayName, 5),
    UserList = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 5),
    AppList = make_set(AppDisplayName, 3),
    FirstAccess = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAccess = max(TimeGenerated)
  by RemediationAction, ActionSeverity, Platform, RiskLevel
| extend
    ImpactScore = (CriticalDevices * 5) + (HighRiskDevices * 3) + (NonCompliantDevices * 2) + (UnmanagedDevices * 1),
    AccessFrequency = round(todouble(ActionCount) / todouble(datetime_diff('day', LastAccess, FirstAccess) + 1), 1)
| extend ResponseEffectiveness = case(
    ImpactScore >= 50, " 需紧急处理",
    ImpactScore >= 20, " 高优先级",
    ImpactScore >= 10, " 中优先级",
    ImpactScore >= 1, " 低优先级",
    " 信息性"
)
| project
    ['修复动作'] = RemediationAction,
    ['平台'] = Platform,
    ['优先级级别'] = ResponseEffectiveness,
    ['严重度'] = ActionSeverity,
    ['风险级别'] = RiskLevel,
    ['影响评分'] = ImpactScore,
    ['总计 AI 访问'] = ActionCount,
    ['访问/天'] = AccessFrequency,
    ['严重设备数'] = CriticalDevices,
    ['高风险设备数'] = HighRiskDevices,
    ['不合规'] = NonCompliantDevices,
    ['非受管'] = UnmanagedDevices,
    ['唯一设备数'] = UniqueDevices,
    ['用户数受影响'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['AI 应用已访问'] = UniqueApps,
    ['设备样本'] = tostring(DeviceList),
    ['用户样本'] = tostring(UserList),
    ['应用样本'] = tostring(AppList),
    ['首次访问'] = format_datetime(FirstAccess, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后访问'] = format_datetime(LastAccess, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['影响评分'] desc, ['总计 AI 访问'] desc
content.title: ⚠️ AI 访问来自不合规 & 高风险设备数

content.json:
📦 AI模型清单与漏洞管理

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：该视图结合Microsoft Defender for Cloud遥测数据与Azure资源发现，展示AI服务的实时清单。追踪基线覆盖度、监控待修复漏洞，并提供可执行情报，确保AI部署符合企业安全标准。

📋 资产清单

持续追踪Azure中已部署的AI服务及关键安全指标

🔧 漏洞治理

利用实时Defender for Cloud发现项映射到AI工作负载，优先处理修复

---

content.query:
// AI Model Asset Inventory - Based on Available Data Sources (Fixed)
// Approach 1: Get AI service information from Azure Activity Logs
let aiServiceEvents = AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| where ResourceProvider in (
    "Microsoft.CognitiveServices",
    "Microsoft.MachineLearningServices", 
    "Microsoft.OpenAI",
    "Microsoft.BotService"
)
| where OperationNameValue in (
    "Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/write",
    "Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces/write",
    "Microsoft.OpenAI/accounts/write",
    "Microsoft.BotService/botServices/write"
)
| extend 
    AIServiceType = case(
        ResourceProvider == "Microsoft.CognitiveServices", "🧠 认知服务",
        ResourceProvider == "Microsoft.MachineLearningServices", "📊 机器学习服务",
        ResourceProvider == "Microsoft.OpenAI", "🤖 Azure OpenAI",
        ResourceProvider == "Microsoft.BotService", "🤝 机器人服务",
        "⚙️ 其他AI服务"
    ),
    ServiceName = coalesce(Resource, ResourceId)
| summarize 
    LastActivity = max(TimeGenerated),
    ActivityCount = count(),
    UniqueOperations = dcount(OperationNameValue)
  by ServiceName, AIServiceType, ResourceGroup, ResourceProvider;

// Approach 2: Identify AI-related resources from security alerts
let aiSecurityAlerts = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where CompromisedEntity has_any ("cognitive", "openai", "ml", "bot", "ai")
| extend 
    AIResourceName = CompromisedEntity,
    AIServiceType = case(
        CompromisedEntity has "cognitive", "🧠 认知服务",
        CompromisedEntity has "openai", "🤖 Azure OpenAI", 
        CompromisedEntity has "ml", "📊 机器学习服务",
        CompromisedEntity has "bot", "🤝 机器人服务",
        "⚙️ 其他AI服务"
    )
| summarize 
    TotalAlerts = count(),
    HighSeverityAlerts = countif(AlertSeverity == "高"),
    LastAlert = max(TimeGenerated)
  by AIResourceName, AIServiceType;

// Merge data sources
aiServiceEvents
| join kind=fullouter (aiSecurityAlerts) on $left.ServiceName == $right.AIResourceName
| extend 
    FinalServiceName = coalesce(ServiceName, AIResourceName),
    FinalServiceType = coalesce(AIServiceType, AIServiceType1),
    TotalAlerts = coalesce(TotalAlerts, 0),
    HighSeverityAlerts = coalesce(HighSeverityAlerts, 0)
| extend 
    RiskScore = case(
        HighSeverityAlerts >= 5, 90,
        HighSeverityAlerts >= 3, 75,
        HighSeverityAlerts >= 1, 60,
        TotalAlerts >= 5, 45,
        TotalAlerts >= 1, 30,
        15
    ),
    RiskLevel = case(
        HighSeverityAlerts >= 5, "🔥 严重风险",
        HighSeverityAlerts >= 3, "🔴 高风险",
        HighSeverityAlerts >= 1 or TotalAlerts >= 5, "🟠 中风险",
        TotalAlerts >= 1, "🟡 低风险",
        "🟢 无风险"
    ),
    SecurityStatus = case(
        HighSeverityAlerts > 0, strcat("🚨 ", tostring(HighSeverityAlerts), " 严重告警"),
        TotalAlerts > 0, strcat("⚠️ ", tostring(TotalAlerts), " 通用告警"),
        "✅ 无安全告警"
    )
| project 
    ['AI 服务名称'] = FinalServiceName,
    ['服务类型'] = FinalServiceType,
    ['资源组'] = coalesce(ResourceGroup, "未知"),
    ['风险级别'] = RiskLevel,
    ['风险评分'] = RiskScore,
    ['安全状态'] = SecurityStatus,
    ['严重告警'] = HighSeverityAlerts,
    ['总计告警'] = TotalAlerts,
    ['最后活动'] = coalesce(LastActivity, LastAlert),
    ['活动数量'] = coalesce(ActivityCount, 0)
| order by ['风险评分'] desc, ['总计告警'] desc
| take 25
content.title: 📦 AI 服务 & 风险评估

content.query:
// AI service configuration change monitoring (multi-source)
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
let auditChanges =
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| extend TargetResourcesText = tostring(TargetResources), AdditionalDetailsText = tostring(AdditionalDetails)
| where OperationName has_any ('添加', '更新', '删除', '修改', '创建', '移除', '授权', '撤销', 'Add', 'Update', 'Delete', 'Create', 'Remove', 'Grant', 'Consent', 'Assign', 'Write', 'Patch')
| where TargetResourcesText has_any ('cognitive', 'openai', 'machinelearning', 'bot', 'ai', 'copilot', 'microsoft.cognitiveservices')
    or AdditionalDetailsText has_any ('CognitiveServices', 'OpenAI', 'MachineLearning', 'BotService', 'Copilot')
    or Category == 'ApplicationManagement'
| extend
    ResourceName = coalesce(tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName), tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), tostring(TargetResources[0].id), '未知资源'),
    Actor = coalesce(tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName), tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalName), '系统操作'),
    SourceIP = coalesce(tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress), tostring(InitiatedBy.app.ipAddress), 'IP未记录'),
    Operation = tostring(OperationName),
    ResultStatus = tostring(Result)
| extend
    AIServiceType = case(
        TargetResourcesText has 'cognitive' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'CognitiveServices', ' 认知服务',
        TargetResourcesText has 'openai' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'OpenAI', ' Azure OpenAI',
        TargetResourcesText has 'machinelearning' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'MachineLearning', ' 机器学习',
        TargetResourcesText has 'bot' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'BotService', ' 机器人服务',
        TargetResourcesText has 'copilot' or AdditionalDetailsText has 'Copilot', ' Microsoft Copilot',
        Category == 'ApplicationManagement', ' 应用管理',
        ' 其他服务'
    ),
    RiskLevel = case(
        Operation has_any ('删除', '移除', '撤销', 'Delete', 'Remove'), ' 高风险操作',
        Operation has_any ('授权', '添加', 'Grant', 'Consent', 'Assign') and TargetResourcesText has_any ('admin', 'owner', 'contributor'), ' 权限提升',
        Operation has_any ('更新', '修改', 'Update', 'Patch') and TargetResourcesText has_any ('key', 'secret', 'credential'), ' 敏感变更',
        Operation has_any ('创建', '添加', 'Create', 'Add', 'Write'), ' 资源创建',
        ' 常规操作'
    ),
    ChangeDetails = case(
        Operation has_any ('添加', 'Add', 'Create'), strcat('Added: ', tostring(TargetResources[0].type)),
        Operation has_any ('删除', 'Delete', 'Remove'), strcat('Deleted: ', tostring(TargetResources[0].type)),
        Operation has_any ('授权', 'Grant', 'Consent', 'Assign'), strcat('Permission Action: ', Operation),
        strcat('Operation: ', Operation)
    )
| project TimeGenerated, AIServiceType, ResourceName, OperationName = Operation, RiskLevel, Actor, SourceIP, ChangeDetails, Result = ResultStatus;
let azureChanges =
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where ResourceProviderValue has_any ('Microsoft.CognitiveServices', 'Microsoft.OpenAI', 'Microsoft.MachineLearningServices', 'Microsoft.BotService')
    or ResourceId has_any ('cognitive', 'openai', 'machinelearning', 'bot', 'copilot')
| extend
    Operation = coalesce(tostring(OperationNameValue), tostring(OperationName)),
    ResourceName = coalesce(tostring(Resource), tostring(split(ResourceId, '/')[array_length(split(ResourceId, '/')) - 1]), '未知资源'),
    Actor = coalesce(tostring(Caller), '系统操作'),
    SourceIP = coalesce(tostring(CallerIpAddress), 'IP未记录'),
    ResultStatus = coalesce(tostring(ActivityStatusValue), tostring(ActivityStatus), '未知')
| extend
    AIServiceType = case(
        tostring(ResourceProviderValue) has 'CognitiveServices', ' 认知服务',
        tostring(ResourceProviderValue) has 'OpenAI', ' Azure OpenAI',
        tostring(ResourceProviderValue) has 'MachineLearningServices', ' 机器学习',
        tostring(ResourceProviderValue) has 'BotService', ' 机器人服务',
        ' 其他服务'
    ),
    RiskLevel = case(
        Operation has_any ('Delete', 'Remove'), ' 高风险操作',
        Operation has_any ('Write', 'Create'), ' 资源创建',
        Operation has_any ('Update', 'Patch'), ' 敏感变更',
        ' 常规操作'
    ),
    ChangeDetails = strcat('Source: AzureActivity, RG: ', coalesce(tostring(ResourceGroup), '-'))
| project TimeGenerated, AIServiceType, ResourceName, OperationName = Operation, RiskLevel, Actor, SourceIP, ChangeDetails, Result = ResultStatus;
union isfuzzy=true auditChanges, azureChanges
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
| project
    ['时间戳'] = format_datetime(TimeGenerated, 'MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    ['AI 服务类型'] = AIServiceType,
    ['资源名称'] = ResourceName,
    ['操作类型'] = OperationName,
    ['风险级别'] = RiskLevel,
    ['操作主体'] = Actor,
    ['来源 IP 地址'] = SourceIP,
    ['变更详情'] = ChangeDetails,
    ['操作结果'] = Result
content.title: ⚙️ AI 服务配置变更监控

content.query:
// AI 服务访问授权监控（仅授权变更事件）
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where Category == 'ApplicationManagement'
| where OperationName has_any (
    '应用同意授权',
    'Grant admin consent',
    'Add delegated permission grant',
    'Add app role assignment grant',
    '添加服务主体',
    'Add OAuth2PermissionGrant',
    'Update application',
    'Update service principal',
    'Remove delegated permission grant',
    'Remove app role assignment grant'
)
| where tostring(TargetResources) has_any ('AI', 'Cognitive', 'OpenAI', 'Bot', 'Copilot', 'GPT', '机器学习', 'Machine Learning')
    or tostring(AdditionalDetails) has_any ('Cognitive', 'OpenAI', 'AI', 'permission', 'consent', 'OAuth2', 'app role', '权限', '授权')
| extend
    AppName = coalesce(tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName), '未知应用'),
    AppId = tostring(TargetResources[0].id),
    PermissionDetails = coalesce(
        tostring(TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[0].newValue),
        tostring(TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties),
        tostring(AdditionalDetails),
        '未记录'
    ),
    Actor = coalesce(
        tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
        tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName),
        '系统操作'
    )
| extend
    AIServiceType = case(
        AppName has 'Cognitive' or tostring(TargetResources) has 'Cognitive', ' 认知服务',
        AppName has 'OpenAI' or tostring(TargetResources) has 'OpenAI', ' Azure OpenAI',
        AppName has 'Copilot' or tostring(TargetResources) has 'Copilot', ' Microsoft Copilot',
        AppName has 'Bot' or tostring(TargetResources) has 'Bot', ' 机器人服务',
        AppName has 'ML' or AppName has '机器学习' or AppName has 'Machine Learning', ' 机器学习',
        ' 其他AI服务'
    ),
    AuthorizationEvent = case(
        OperationName has 'Grant admin consent' or OperationName has 'app role assignment', '管理员/角色授权',
        OperationName has 'delegated permission grant' or OperationName has 'OAuth2', '委派/OAuth 授权',
        OperationName has '应用同意授权' or OperationName has 'Consent to application', '应用同意授权',
        OperationName has '添加服务主体' or OperationName has 'Add service principal', '服务主体配置',
        OperationName has 'Update application' or OperationName has 'Update service principal', '授权配置更新',
        OperationName has 'Remove', '授权撤销',
        '授权变更'
    ),
    SecurityLevel = case(
        PermissionDetails has_any ('full_control', 'admin', 'owner', '.default', 'Directory.ReadWrite.All', 'AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All'), ' 高风险',
        PermissionDetails has_any ('write', 'contributor', 'ReadWrite', 'role'), ' 中风险',
        PermissionDetails has_any ('read', 'reader', 'User.Read'), ' 低风险',
        ' 未知风险'
    )
| project
    ['时间'] = format_datetime(TimeGenerated, 'MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    ['AI 服务类型'] = AIServiceType,
    ['应用名称'] = AppName,
    ['应用 ID'] = AppId,
    ['授权事件'] = AuthorizationEvent,
    ['操作名称'] = OperationName,
    ['权限详情'] = PermissionDetails,
    ['风险级别'] = SecurityLevel,
    ['执行者'] = Actor,
    ['操作结果'] = tostring(Result)
| order by ['时间'] desc
| take 50

content.query:
// AI 应用使用与访问追踪（与授权监控分离）
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
let signInActivity =
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where isnotempty(AppDisplayName)
| extend
    AgentName = AppDisplayName,
    Actor = coalesce(tostring(UserPrincipalName), '未知用户'),
    EventStatus = iff(tostring(ResultType) == '0', 'Success', 'Failed'),
    Source = 'SigninLogs'
| project TimeGenerated, AgentName, Actor, EventStatus, Source;
let auditActivity =
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where Category == 'ApplicationManagement'
| extend
    AgentName = coalesce(tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName), '未知应用'),
    Actor = coalesce(tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName), '系统操作'),
    EventStatus = iff(tolower(tostring(Result)) == 'success', 'Success', 'Failed'),
    Source = 'AuditLogs'
| project TimeGenerated, AgentName, Actor, EventStatus, Source;
union isfuzzy=true signInActivity, auditActivity
| where AgentName has_any ('copilot', 'openai', 'cognitive', 'ai', 'gpt', 'machine learning', '机器学习', 'assistant', 'bot')
| summarize
    TotalActivity = count(),
    ActiveCount = countif(EventStatus == 'Success'),
    FailedCount = countif(EventStatus == 'Failed'),
    UniqueOwners = dcount(Actor),
    Owners = make_set(Actor, 8),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastActivity = max(TimeGenerated),
    SourceSet = make_set(Source, 3),
    SourceCount = dcount(Source)
  by AgentName
| extend
    AgentType = case(
        tolower(AgentName) has 'copilot', 'Microsoft Copilot',
        tolower(AgentName) has 'openai' or tolower(AgentName) has 'gpt', '生成式 AI',
        tolower(AgentName) has 'cognitive', '认知服务',
        tolower(AgentName) has 'bot', '机器人服务',
        tolower(AgentName) has 'machine learning' or AgentName has '机器学习', '机器学习',
        '其他AI应用'
    ),
    Source = iff(SourceCount > 1, 'SigninLogs+AuditLogs', tostring(SourceSet[0])),
    HealthStatus = case(
        FailedCount >= 5 and FailedCount > ActiveCount, 'Critical',
        FailedCount > 0, 'Degraded',
        'Healthy'
    )
| extend
    DaysActive = datetime_diff('day', LastActivity, FirstSeen) + 1,
    AgentAgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), FirstSeen)
| extend
    ActivityDays = iff(DaysActive < 1, 1, DaysActive),
    AgentAge = case(
        AgentAgeDays < 7, '新应用(<7天)',
        AgentAgeDays < 30, '近期(<30天)',
        AgentAgeDays < 90, '已建立(<3个月)',
        '成熟应用(3个月+)'
    ),
    UsageFrequency = round(todouble(TotalActivity) / todouble(iff(DaysActive < 1, 1, DaysActive)), 1)
| project
    ['应用名称'] = AgentName,
    ['应用类型'] = AgentType,
    ['数据来源'] = Source,
    ['健康状态'] = HealthStatus,
    ['应用年龄'] = AgentAge,
    ['总活动数'] = TotalActivity,
    ['日均活动'] = UsageFrequency,
    ['成功会话'] = ActiveCount,
    ['失败/异常'] = FailedCount,
    ['唯一用户数'] = UniqueOwners,
    ['用户列表'] = tostring(Owners),
    ['首次发现'] = format_datetime(FirstSeen, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后活动'] = format_datetime(LastActivity, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['活跃天数'] = ActivityDays
| order by ['总活动数'] desc, ['最后活动'] desc

content.query:
// AI-related Data Sensitivity Analysis - Fixed (Using Available Data Sources)
// Solution 1: Use CloudAppEvents to get file access information
let aiFilePatterns = dynamic(["model", "train", "data", "dataset", "ml", "ai", "predict", "analytics", "neural", "json", "csv", "pkl", "h5", "keras", "tensorflow", "pytorch"]);

CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where ActionType in ("FileAccessed", "FileDownloaded", "FileModified", "FileUploaded")
| where ObjectName has_any (aiFilePatterns) or ObjectId has_any (aiFilePatterns)
| extend 
    FileExtension = tostring(split(ObjectName, ".")[-1]),
    IsAIRelated = ObjectName has_any(aiFilePatterns) or ObjectId has_any(aiFilePatterns)
| where IsAIRelated
| extend 
    DataCategory = case(
        FileExtension in ("h5", "pb", "pt", "pkl", "onnx", "tflite", "bin"), "🤖 AI模型文件",
        FileExtension in ("json", "yaml", "yml", "toml", "ini", "config"), "⚙️ 配置文件",
        FileExtension in ("csv", "tsv", "parquet", "avro", "xls", "xlsx"), "📊 数据集文件",
        FileExtension in ("py", "ipynb", "r", "js"), "💻  代码文件",
        "📁 其他文件"
    ),
    SensitivityLevel = case(
        ObjectName has_any ("confidential", "secret", "sensitive", "personal", "pii"), "🔴 高敏感度",
        ObjectName has_any ("internal", "restricted"), "🟠 中敏感度", 
        ObjectName has "public", "🟢 公开",
        "⚪ 未分类"
    )
| summarize 
    FileCount = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(AccountDisplayName),
    SensitiveFileCount = countif(SensitivityLevel has "敏感度"),
    LastAccess = max(TimeGenerated)
  by DataCategory, SensitivityLevel, Application
| extend 
    SensitiveRatio = round(100.0 * SensitiveFileCount / FileCount, 1)
| project 
    ['数据类别'] = DataCategory,
    ['敏感度标签'] = SensitivityLevel,
    ['应用平台'] = Application,
    ['总计文件数'] = FileCount,
    ['敏感文件数'] = SensitiveFileCount,
    ['敏感度占比'] = strcat(tostring(SensitiveRatio), '%'),
    ['访问用户数'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['最后访问'] = format_datetime(LastAccess, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['敏感文件数'] desc
| take 25

// AI Application Data Compliance Monitoring (Based on SigninLogs and SecurityAlert)

let restrictedAIApps = dynamic(["ChatGPT", "Claude", "Google Bard", "Notion AI"]);

content.query:
//  Sensitive Data AI Processing Alert Analysis
// Tracks security alerts related to AI services accessing or processing sensitive data
// Uses SecurityAlert table for DLP and data security alerts
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where AlertName has_any ("DLP", "数据", "隐私", "泄露", "数据外泄", "敏感", "信息")
| where Description has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "ChatGPT", "模型", "Prompt", "OpenAI", "Cognitive") or
        Entities has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "OpenAI")
| extend
    DataType = case(
        Description has_any ("PII", "personal", "SSN", "credit card", "passport"), " 个人身份信息",
        Description has_any ("financial", "payment", "bank", "account"), " 财务数据",
        Description has_any ("health", "medical", "PHI", "patient"), " 健康数据",
        Description has_any ("confidential", "secret", "classified", "proprietary"), " 机密信息",
        Description has_any ("password", "credential", "token", "key"), "? 凭据",
        " 通用敏感数据"
    )
| extend
    AIContext = case(
        Description has "Copilot" or Entities has "Copilot", " Microsoft Copilot",
        Description has "ChatGPT" or Entities has "ChatGPT", " ChatGPT",
        Description has "OpenAI" or Entities has "OpenAI", " OpenAI服务",
        Description has "Cognitive" or Entities has "Cognitive", " 认知服务",
        Description has "模型", " AI模型",
        " 其他AI服务"
    ),
    RiskScore = case(
        AlertSeverity == "高" and DataType has "Identification", 95,
        AlertSeverity == "高" and DataType has "财务", 90,
        AlertSeverity == "高" and DataType has "健康", 90,
        AlertSeverity == "高" and DataType has "Credentials", 95,
        AlertSeverity == "高", 80,
        AlertSeverity == "中" and DataType has_any ("Identification", "财务", "健康"), 70,
        AlertSeverity == "中", 60,
        AlertSeverity == "低", 40,
        30
    )
| project
    ['时间'] = format_datetime(TimeGenerated, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['AI 服务'] = AIContext,
    ['数据类型'] = DataType,
    ['告警严重度'] = AlertSeverity,
    ['风险评分'] = RiskScore,
    ['告警名称'] = AlertName,
    ['受影响实体'] = coalesce(CompromisedEntity, tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0]), "未知"),
    ['状态'] = Status,
    ['描述'] = substring(Description, 0, 100)
| order by ['风险评分'] desc, ['时间'] desc
| take 30

content.query:
//  AI Agent Governance & Security Monitoring (M365 + Entra + Azure + AI Foundry)
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
union isfuzzy=true
    (
    // Purview governance signals
    PurviewAuditLogs
    | extend EventTime = todatetime(coalesce(column_ifexists('TimeGenerated', datetime(null)), column_ifexists('Timestamp', datetime(null))))
    | where EventTime > t0
    | where tostring(column_ifexists('OperationName','')) has_any ("AIAgent", "Agent", "部署", "ModelDeploy", "Copilot")
    | extend
        Source = "Purview AI Hub",
        AgentName = tostring(column_ifexists('ObjectId','N/A')),
        Activity = tostring(column_ifexists('OperationName','未知')),
        ComplianceStatus = case(
            tostring(column_ifexists('ResultStatus','')) =~ "Success" and Activity has "Deploy", "合规",
            tostring(column_ifexists('ResultStatus','')) =~ "Failure", "不合规",
            Activity has "删除", "审查中",
            "待处理"
        ),
        RiskLevel = case(ComplianceStatus == "不合规", "高", Activity has_any ("修改", "更新"), "中", "低"),
        User = tostring(column_ifexists('UserId','未知')),
        IPAddress = tostring(column_ifexists('ClientIP',''))
    | project TimeGenerated = EventTime, Source, AgentName, Activity, ComplianceStatus, RiskLevel, User, IPAddress
    ),
    (
    // Azure/Foundry admin operations
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where OperationName has_any ("AI", "Agent", "模型", "部署", "Copilot", "OpenAI")
    | extend
        Source = "AI Foundry / Entra Audit",
        AgentName = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName),
        Activity = OperationName,
        ComplianceStatus = case(
            Result =~ "success" and OperationName has_any ("创建", "添加"), "合规",
            Result =~ "failure", "不合规",
            OperationName has "删除", "审查中",
            "待处理"
        ),
        RiskLevel = case(Result =~ "failure" or OperationName has "删除", "高", OperationName has_any ("更新", "修改", "授权"), "中", "低"),
        User = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
        IPAddress = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
    | project TimeGenerated, Source, AgentName, Activity, ComplianceStatus, RiskLevel, User, IPAddress
    ),
    (
    // Entra access posture to AI apps
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where AppDisplayName has_any ("AI Studio", "AI Foundry", "Azure AI", "Copilot", "OpenAI")
    | extend
        Source = "Entra登录治理",
        AgentName = AppDisplayName,
        Activity = strcat("登录：", AppDisplayName),
        ComplianceStatus = case(ResultType == "0" and RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "none", "合规", ResultType != "0" or RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("high","medium"), "不合规", "待处理"),
        RiskLevel = case(RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high" or ResultType != "0", "高", RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "medium", "中", "低"),
        User = UserPrincipalName,
        IPAddress = IPAddress
    | project TimeGenerated, Source, AgentName, Activity, ComplianceStatus, RiskLevel, User, IPAddress
    ),
    (
    // MDO signal for AI-related email abuse
    EmailEvents
    | extend EventTime = todatetime(coalesce(column_ifexists('TimeGenerated', datetime(null)), column_ifexists('Timestamp', datetime(null))))
    | where EventTime > t0
    | where tostring(column_ifexists('Subject','')) has_any ("ai","copilot","openai","prompt")
        or tostring(column_ifexists('ThreatTypes','')) has_any ("phish","malware")
    | extend
        Source = "MDO邮件安全",
        AgentName = "邮件攻击面",
        Activity = tostring(column_ifexists('ThreatTypes','邮件活动')),
        ComplianceStatus = case(tostring(column_ifexists('DeliveryAction','')) has_any ("Blocked","已隔离"), "合规", "不合规"),
        RiskLevel = case(tostring(column_ifexists('ThreatTypes','')) has_any ("malware","phish"), "高", "中"),
        User = tostring(column_ifexists('RecipientEmailAddress','未知')),
        IPAddress = ""
    | project TimeGenerated = EventTime, Source, AgentName, Activity, ComplianceStatus, RiskLevel, User, IPAddress
    ),
    (
    // MDA cloud app governance signals
    CloudAppEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where Application has_any ("AI", "Copilot", "OpenAI", "Azure AI") or ObjectName has_any ("model","dataset","prompt")
    | extend
        Source = "MDA云应用治理",
        AgentName = tostring(Application),
        Activity = tostring(ActionType),
        ComplianceStatus = case(ActionType has_any ("DlpRuleMatch", "DLPViolation"), "不合规", "合规"),
        RiskLevel = case(ActionType has_any ("DlpRuleMatch","DLPViolation"), "高", ActionType has_any ("FileDownloaded","FileUploaded"), "中", "低"),
        User = tostring(coalesce(column_ifexists('AccountDisplayName',''), column_ifexists('AccountObjectId','未知'))),
        IPAddress = tostring(column_ifexists('IPAddress',''))
    | project TimeGenerated, Source, AgentName, Activity, ComplianceStatus, RiskLevel, User, IPAddress
    ),
    (
    // MDI/Identity risk governance signals
    IdentityLogonEvents
    | extend EventTime = todatetime(coalesce(column_ifexists('TimeGenerated', datetime(null)), column_ifexists('Timestamp', datetime(null))))
    | where EventTime > t0
    | where tostring(column_ifexists('应用','')) has_any ("ai","copilot","openai")
        or tostring(column_ifexists('AdditionalFields','')) has_any ("risky","impossible","anonymous")
    | extend
        Source = "MDI身份治理",
        AgentName = tostring(column_ifexists('应用','身份攻击面')),
        Activity = "身份登录风险",
        ComplianceStatus = case(tostring(column_ifexists('AdditionalFields','')) has_any ("high","impossible","anonymous"), "不合规", "合规"),
        RiskLevel = case(ComplianceStatus == "不合规", "高", "中"),
        User = tostring(coalesce(column_ifexists('AccountUpn',''), column_ifexists('AccountName','未知'))),
        IPAddress = tostring(column_ifexists('IPAddress',''))
    | project TimeGenerated = EventTime, Source, AgentName, Activity, ComplianceStatus, RiskLevel, User, IPAddress
    )
| summarize
    TotalActivities = count(),
    CompliantCount = countif(ComplianceStatus == "合规"),
    NonCompliantCount = countif(ComplianceStatus == "不合规"),
    HighRiskCount = countif(RiskLevel == "高"),
    MediumRiskCount = countif(RiskLevel == "中"),
    UniqueAgents = dcountif(AgentName, AgentName != "N/A"),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(User),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    FirstActivity = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastActivity = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Source
| extend
    ComplianceRate = round((todouble(CompliantCount) / todouble(TotalActivities)) * 100, 1),
    RiskScore = (HighRiskCount * 3) + (MediumRiskCount * 2) + NonCompliantCount
| extend GovernanceStatus = case(
    ComplianceRate >= 95 and RiskScore < 10, "优秀治理",
    ComplianceRate >= 85 and RiskScore < 20, "良好治理",
    ComplianceRate >= 70 and RiskScore < 40, "需改进",
    "较差治理 - 需采取行动"
)
| project
    ['数据来源'] = Source,
    ['治理状态'] = GovernanceStatus,
    ['总计活动数'] = TotalActivities,
    ['合规率 %'] = ComplianceRate,
    ['风险评分'] = RiskScore,
    ['合规'] = CompliantCount,
    ['不合规'] = NonCompliantCount,
    ['高风险事件'] = HighRiskCount,
    ['唯一内容'] = UniqueAgents,
    ['唯一用户数'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['唯一 IP数'] = UniqueIPs,
    ['首次活动'] = format_datetime(FirstActivity, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后活动'] = format_datetime(LastActivity, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['风险评分'] desc, ['总计活动数'] desc
content.title: 🤖 AI 内容治理 & 合规监控

content.query:
//  AI Agent Content Safety & Prompt Shield Violations
// Simplified query for Content Safety monitoring
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| extend AlertNameLower = tolower(AlertName), DescriptionLower = tolower(Description)
| where AlertNameLower has_any ("content", "prompt", "shield", "safety", "jailbreak", "injection", "toxic", "harmful", "abuse", "violation") or
        DescriptionLower has_any ("content", "prompt", "shield", "safety", "jailbreak", "injection", "toxic", "harmful")
| extend
    ViolationType = case(
        AlertNameLower has "prompt" and AlertNameLower has_any ("injection", "shield"), "🛡️ 提示词防护 - 注入攻击",
        AlertNameLower has "jailbreak", "🚨 越狱尝试",
        AlertNameLower has "hate" or DescriptionLower has "hate", "⚠️ 内容安全 - 仇恨言论",
        AlertNameLower has "violence" or DescriptionLower has "violence", "🔴 内容安全 - 暴力",
        AlertNameLower has "sexual" or DescriptionLower has "sexual", "🔞 内容安全 - 色情内容",
        AlertNameLower has "selfharm" or DescriptionLower has "self-harm", "⚕️ 内容安全 - 自残",
        AlertNameLower has "toxic" or DescriptionLower has "toxic", "☠️ 有害内容检测",
        "⚠️ 其他内容违规"
    ),
    UserPrincipal = coalesce(CompromisedEntity, tostring(parse_json(tostring(Entities))[0].Name), "未知用户")
| summarize
    ViolationCount = count(),
    CriticalCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "高"),
    MediumCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "中"),
    LowCount = countif(AlertSeverity == "低"),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipal),
    FirstViolation = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastViolation = max(TimeGenerated),
    SampleAlerts = make_set(AlertName, 3)
  by ViolationType, AlertSeverity
| extend
    SeverityScore = case(
        AlertSeverity == "高", ViolationCount * 5,
        AlertSeverity == "中", ViolationCount * 3,
        ViolationCount * 1
    )
| project
    ['违规类型'] = ViolationType,
    ['严重度'] = AlertSeverity,
    ['总计违规数'] = ViolationCount,
    ['严重度评分'] = SeverityScore,
    ['严重事件'] = CriticalCount,
    ['中事件'] = MediumCount,
    ['低事件'] = LowCount,
    ['唯一用户数'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['样本告警'] = tostring(SampleAlerts),
    ['首次违规'] = format_datetime(FirstViolation, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最后违规'] = format_datetime(LastViolation, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['严重度评分'] desc, ['总计违规数'] desc
content.title: 🛡️ AI 内容安全 & 提示词护栏违规数

content.json:
🎨 多模态AI威胁检测

作者：Jason Liang

> **价值说明**：针对跨文本、图像、音频和视频的多模态AI系统的新兴威胁检测。覆盖深度伪造攻击、跨模态注入、合成媒体检测、生物特征欺骗等高级攻击技术。涵盖包括GPT-4V、Claude-3和Gemini在内的多模态大模型安全风险。

🎭 深度伪造检测

检测AI生成的伪造图像、视频和音频内容

🔀 跨模态攻击

分析文本→图像、音频→视频等跨模态攻击

---

content.query:
// Multimodal AI Usage & Security Overview
// Based on Azure AI Services, OpenAI, and Application logs
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
union isfuzzy=true
    (
    AzureDiagnostics
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES" or Category contains "OpenAI"
    | extend ServiceType = case(
        properties_s contains "vision" or properties_s contains "image" or OperationName contains "视觉", "Computer Vision",
        properties_s contains "speech" or properties_s contains "audio" or OperationName contains "语音", "语音服务",
        properties_s contains "video" or OperationName contains "Video", "视频分析",
        properties_s contains "gpt-4" or properties_s contains "dalle" or OperationName contains "OpenAI", "GPT-4/DALL-E",
        "文本处理"
    )
    | extend RiskIndicator = case(
        OperationName contains "删除" or ResultType == "Failure", "高风险",
        properties_s contains "error" or httpStatusCode_d >= 400, "中风险",
        "正常"
    )
    | project TimeGenerated, ServiceType, RiskIndicator, OperationName, ResultType, CallerIPAddress
    ),
    (
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > t0
    | where AppDisplayName has_any ("OpenAI", "Cognitive", "视觉", "语音")
    | extend ServiceType = "AI服务访问"
    | extend RiskIndicator = case(
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high" or RiskLevelAggregated == "high", "高风险",
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "medium" or RiskLevelAggregated == "medium", "中风险",
        "正常"
    )
    | project TimeGenerated, ServiceType, RiskIndicator, OperationName = AppDisplayName, ResultType = ResultType, CallerIPAddress = IPAddress
    )
| summarize 
    TotalRequests = count(),
    HighRiskCount = countif(RiskIndicator == "高风险"),
    MediumRiskCount = countif(RiskIndicator == "中风险"),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(CallerIPAddress),
    FailureCount = countif(ResultType == "Failure" or ResultType != "0"),
    FirstActivity = min(TimeGenerated),
    LatestActivity = max(TimeGenerated)
  by ServiceType
| extend 
    RiskScore = (HighRiskCount * 3) + (MediumRiskCount * 2) + FailureCount,
    SuccessRate = round((todouble(TotalRequests - FailureCount) / todouble(TotalRequests)) * 100, 1)
| extend ThreatLevel = case(
    RiskScore >= 50, "🔥 严重威胁",
    RiskScore >= 20, "🔴 高威胁",
    RiskScore >= 5, "🟠 中威胁",
    "🟢 低威胁"
)
| project 
    ['服务类型'] = ServiceType,
    ['威胁级别'] = ThreatLevel,
    ['总计请求数'] = TotalRequests,
    ['风险评分'] = RiskScore,
    ['高风险事件'] = HighRiskCount,
    ['中风险事件'] = MediumRiskCount,
    ['失败数量'] = FailureCount,
    ['成功率 %'] = SuccessRate,
    ['唯一 IP 数量'] = UniqueIPs,
    ['首次活动'] = format_datetime(FirstActivity, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最近活动'] = format_datetime(LatestActivity, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['风险评分'] desc, ['总计请求数'] desc
content.title: 🎨 多模态 AI 使用 & 安全总览

content.query:
// AI Service Usage Trend Analysis
// Monitors AI service sign-in trends over selected time period
let lookbackDays = toint({TrendDays});
let t0 = ago(lookbackDays * 1d);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| extend AppNameLower = tolower(AppDisplayName), ResourceLower = tolower(ResourceDisplayName)
| where AppNameLower has_any ("openai", "cognitive", "vision", "speech", "ai", "copilot", "azure", "microsoft") or
        ResourceLower has_any ("openai", "cognitive", "ai")
| extend ServiceCategory = case(
    AppNameLower has "vision" or ResourceLower has "vision", "🖼️ 视觉服务",
    AppNameLower has "speech" or ResourceLower has "speech", "🎤 语音服务",
    AppNameLower has "openai" or ResourceLower has "openai", "🤖 OpenAI服务",
    AppNameLower has "copilot", "💼 Microsoft Copilot",
    AppNameLower has "cognitive" or ResourceLower has "cognitive", "🧠 认知服务",
    "🔧 其他AI服务"
)
| extend IsSuccess = iff(ResultType == "0", 1, 0)
| extend IsAnomaly = iff(RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("high", "medium") or ResultType != "0", 1, 0)
| extend DayBucket = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| summarize 
    TotalEvents = count(),
    SuccessfulEvents = countif(IsSuccess == 1),
    FailedEvents = countif(IsSuccess == 0),
    AnomalousEvents = countif(IsAnomaly == 1),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    UniqueApps = dcount(AppDisplayName)
  by DayBucket, ServiceCategory
| extend 
    SuccessRate = round((todouble(SuccessfulEvents) / todouble(TotalEvents)) * 100, 1),
    AnomalyRate = round((todouble(AnomalousEvents) / todouble(TotalEvents)) * 100, 1)
| extend Trend = case(
    AnomalyRate >= 30, "🔴 高风险",
    AnomalyRate >= 10, "🟠 中风险",
    AnomalyRate > 0, "🟡 低风险",
    "🟢 正常"
)
| project 
    ['日期'] = format_datetime(DayBucket, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    ['服务类别'] = ServiceCategory,
    ['状态'] = Trend,
    ['总计事件'] = TotalEvents,
    ['成功'] = SuccessfulEvents,
    ['失败'] = FailedEvents,
    ['异常'] = AnomalousEvents,
    ['唯一用户数'] = UniqueUsers,
    ['唯一应用'] = UniqueApps,
    ['成功率 % ✅'] = SuccessRate,
    ['异常率 % ⚠️'] = AnomalyRate
| order by ['日期'] desc, ['总计事件'] desc
| take 100
content.title: 🎨 AI 服务使用趋势分析(最后 {TrendDays} 天)

content.query:
// AI Service User Behavior Analysis
// Identifies users with unusual AI service access patterns
let t0 = {TimeRange:start};
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > t0
| where AppDisplayName has_any ("OpenAI", "Cognitive", "视觉", "语音", "Azure AI", "Azure OpenAI")
   or ResourceDisplayName has_any ("Azure OpenAI", "认知服务", "Azure AI")
| extend 
    RiskScore = case(
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high", 3,
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "medium", 2,
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "low", 1,
        0
    ),
    IsFailure = iff(ResultType != "0", 1, 0)
| summarize 
    TotalSignins = count(),
    FailedSignins = sum(IsFailure),
    UniqueApps = dcount(AppDisplayName),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    TotalRiskScore = sum(RiskScore),
    Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 5),
    Locations = make_set(Location, 3),
    FirstAccess = min(TimeGenerated),
    LatestAccess = max(TimeGenerated)
  by UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName
| extend 
    CombinedRiskScore = TotalRiskScore + (FailedSignins * 2),
    SuccessRate = round((todouble(TotalSignins - FailedSignins) / todouble(TotalSignins)) * 100, 1)
| extend ThreatProfile = case(
    CombinedRiskScore >= 50 or UniqueIPs >= 10, "🔴 高风险用户",
    CombinedRiskScore >= 20 or UniqueIPs >= 5, "🟠 中风险用户",
    CombinedRiskScore > 0, "🟡 低风险用户",
    "🟢 正常用户"
)
| extend AccessDuration = datetime_diff('day', LatestAccess, FirstAccess)
| where CombinedRiskScore > 0 or FailedSignins > 0
| project 
    ['用户'] = UserDisplayName,
    ['UPN'] = UserPrincipalName,
    ['威胁画像'] = ThreatProfile,
    ['风险评分'] = CombinedRiskScore,
    ['总计登录'] = TotalSignins,
    ['失败登录'] = FailedSignins,
    ['成功率 %'] = SuccessRate,
    ['唯一应用'] = UniqueApps,
    ['唯一 IP数'] = UniqueIPs,
    ['访问持续时间(天)'] = AccessDuration,
    ['AI 服务'] = strcat_array(Apps, ', '),
    ['位置数'] = strcat_array(Locations, ', '),
    ['首次访问'] = format_datetime(FirstAccess, 'MM-dd HH:mm'),
    ['最近访问'] = format_datetime(LatestAccess, 'MM-dd HH:mm')
| order by ['风险评分'] desc, ['总计登录'] desc
| take 20
